1000649112.english: He must have a plan. That’s why we…
1000649112.korean: 분명 생각이 있으실 거예요. 그러니까 우리는...

1000649113.english: The Poseidon fleet is reducing speed!

1000649114.english: And, and... Gamma is...! Heading from the flagship toward the island...!
1000649114.korean: 그리고, 그리고... 감마가...! 기함에서 섬을 향해...!

1000649117.english: So that’s how you want to play it! Fine, very fine!

1000649118.english: Not some fleet battle like toy soldiers—hand-to-hand combat where blood and flesh fly, that’s true war…!
1000649118.korean: 함대전 같은 병정 놀이가 아니라, 피와 살이 튀는 육박전이야말로 진짜 전쟁이라고 할 수 있지...!

1000649119.english: Gamma! Come out here and face my blade!
1000649119.korean: 감마! 이리 나와 소관의 칼을 받으시오!

1000649120.english: Surely you’re not tucking your tail and running away!
1000649120.korean: 설마하니 꼬리를 말고 도망치는 건 아니겠지!

1000649121.english: Hahaha! As if I ever would?

1000649122.english: At long last, I finally get to have the real fight I’ve been dreaming of…!
1000649122.korean: 이제야 꿈에도 그리던 진짜 싸움을 할 수 있게 됐는데...!

1000649123.english: And because of that real fight…

1000649124.english: Gamma, your head will be the one to fall!
1000649124.korean: 감마, 그대의 목이 달아나게 될 것이오.

1000649125.english: For the great Invincible Dragon to stoop to such cheap taunts!
1000649125.korean: 그 대단한 무적의 용이, 이런 싸구려 도발이라니!

1000649127.english: Fine, I’ll take your bait. All fleets, stand by!
1000649127.korean: 좋아, 그 도발에 넘어가주지. 전 함대 대기!

1000649128.english: The first shot will be filled with longing…

1000649130.english: I thought you'd be rusty after such a long slumber... but it seems that's not the case.
1000649130.korean: 오랫동안 잠들어 있었다고 해서 녹슬어 있을 줄 알았는데... 별로 그런 것도 아닌가보군?

1000649131.english: Not at all. My hands are still tingling.

1000649133.english: For all your taunting, you don't seem eager to fight right away.
1000649133.korean: 도발한 것 치고는 당장 싸울 마음은 없어보이는데.

1000649135.english: Hmph. Fine. Time is on my side, after all.
1000649135.korean: 큭. 뭐, 좋아. 시간은 내 편이니까.

1000649136.english: Whether you take all those traitors with you, or get swept away by PECS forces, I couldn’t care less.
1000649136.korean: 너희가 그 배신자들을 전부 데려가든, 아니면 PECS의 병력에 쓸려나가든 나는 아무 관심 없어.

1000649137.english: I know that well. That is precisely why I came here.
1000649137.korean: 잘 알고 있소. 그렇기에 이렇게 소관이 온 거요.

1000649138.english: ...Tch. So? What, you want to share a drink like the old days?
1000649138.korean: ...흥. 그래서? 예전처럼 같이 술이라도 한 잔 하자는건가?

1000649140.english: Ha! So your skills haven’t dulled, but your banter surely has grown.
1000649140.korean: 하. 못 본 사이에 실력이 녹슨 게 아니라 너스레만 늘었군.

1000649142.english: One’s conduct and bearing change according to their purpose.
1000649142.korean: 목적에 따라 행동과 몸가짐도 달라지는 법이오.

1000649144.english: I think I already know the answer, but out of courtesy, I’ll ask anyway.
1000649144.korean: 안 들어도 대답은 알 것 같지만, 예의상 한 번 물어보겠어.

1000649145.english: I know what you’re about to say, but I’ll hear it out of courtesy as well.
1000649145.korean: 무슨 말을 할지 알겠소만, 소관도 예의상 듣겠소.

1000649150.english: ...Then negotiations have failed. I can take this as your signal to begin, yes?
1000649150.korean: ...그럼 협상 결렬인가. 슬슬 시작하자는 뜻으로 알아들어도 되겠지?

1000649151.english: Before all goes down, allow me to ask in turn. Gamma, why do you follow the Chairmen?
1000649151.korean: 소관이야말로 묻겠소. 감마 그대는 어째서 회장들을 따르는거요?

1000649152.english: As far as I know, you are no villain.

1000649153.english: Of course not! The only ones who can grant me endless struggle are the Chairmen.
1000649153.korean: 그야 당연하지. 내게 끝없는 투쟁을 줄 수 있는 건 회장님밖에 없으니까.

1000649154.english: Do you truly love slaughter that much?

1000649156.english: It’s not the killing I love, but the fight itself. The spray of blood and flesh, the sound of each other’s breath, the surge of emotions we share!
1000649156.korean: 나는 죽이는 게 아니라, 싸움 그 자체가 좋은 거야. 피와 살이 튀고, 서로의 호흡을 느끼고, 끓어오르는 감정을 나누는.

1000649157.english: No one knows this better than you, Dragon!
1000649157.korean: 이건 누구보다 용, 네가 제일 잘 알지 않나?

1000649158.english: ...True. That is the kind of woman you were.

1000649159.english: Battle and strife are my very life. And besides...
1000649159.korean: 전투와 투쟁은 내 삶 그 자체야. 그리고...

1000649160.english: So long as you bear the title ‘Invincible,’ it is inevitable that you and I should fight.
1000649160.korean: 네가 무적이라는 이명을 가진 이상, 나와 싸우게 되는 건 필연이지.

1000649161.english: ......I think I already know your answer, but out of courtesy I’ll ask.
1000649161.korean: ......듣지 않아도 대답은 알 것 같소만, 예의상 물어보겠소.

1000649162.english: Heh. Fine. Out of courtesy, I’ll answer.

1000649163.english: Abandon meaningless battle... and fight by my lord’s side against a greater foe.
1000649163.korean: 무의미한 전투를 그만두고... 주군과 함께 더 큰 적과 맞서 싸우시오.

1000649166.english: As far as I know, that guy is the type to avoid fights rather than start them.
1000649166.korean: 내가 아는한, 그 인간은 싸움을 피하면 피했지 벌이는 성격은 아니니까.

1000649167.english: ......I see. Then the negotiations are truly broken.

1000649168.english: It has been a long time since I spoke with an old rival. It stirs deep feelings.
1000649168.korean: 오랜만에 옛 적과 이야기를 나누어서 감회가 남달랐소.

1000649170.english: We’ve reminisced enough. Time to begin...!
1000649170.korean: 추억팔이는 할 만큼 했으니, 슬슬 시작하자고...!

1000649172.english: This is what I’ve been waiting for...!

1000649174.english: Dragon and Gamma have started clashing!

1000649175.english: Every time Gamma swings her fist, the terrain...!

1000649176.english: Lemonade Gamma... to think she's this strong...

1000649179.english: The enemy fleet is standing still for now, but if we move recklessly, there’s no telling how Gamma might react!
1000649179.korean: 지금은 적 함대가 정지해있지만, 섣불리 움직였다가 감마가 어떤 반응을 보일지 몰라요.

1000649180.english: The Commander, who knows Gamma best, ordered us to hold our ground... there must be a reason.
1000649180.korean: 감마를 가장 잘 알고 있는 대장님이 위치를 사수하라는 명령을 내리셨으니까... 분명 이유가 있을 거예요.

1000649183.english: You haven’t forgotten, have you? That I’m not the kind of Bioroid to neglect my training!
1000649183.korean: 혹시 잊은 건 아니지? 내가 수련을 게을리하는 성격이 아니라는 거.

1000649184.english: Decades may have passed already, you say?

1000649185.english: How could I forget? Who do you think kept you company in those so-called training bouts?
1000649185.korean: 잊을리가 있겠소? 그대의 수련을 빙자한 대련에 어울려준 게 누구였는데.

1000649186.english: Haha, good. As long as you haven’t forgotten. Then...

1000649187.english: Stop fooling around and come at me seriously!

1000649189.english: I am giving it my all.

1000649192.english: What I want is to break you when you’re at full strength, Dragon!
1000649192.korean: 난 전력을 다하는 너를 꺾고 싶은거야, 용.

1000649193.english: You, who never change your expression no matter what...!
1000649193.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도 표정 하나 안 바뀌는 네가...!

1000649194.english: To see you crushed before overwhelming power...

1000649196.english: ...If that’s the sight you wish to see, you’re already getting plenty of it.
1000649196.korean: ...그런 모습이라면 지금도 충분히 볼 수 있소.

1000649200.english: I said I didn’t care whether you saved those refugees or not, but I take it back.
1000649200.korean: 너희가 난민들을 구출하던 말건 신경쓰지 않는다는 말은 취소하지.

1000649201.english: No warrior can fight properly with their back weighing on their mind. That was my mistake...!
1000649201.korean: 뒤가 신경쓰여서야, 그 어떤 전사도 제대로 싸울 수 있을리가 없지. 내 생각이 짧았어...!

1000649206.english: So you’ve finally found the will to fight?

1000649207.english: But it’s too late. Now the tables have turned, haven’t they?

1000649209.english: E-enemy fleet is charging straight through, all at once!
1000649209.korean: 저, 적 함대가 전부 막무가내로 밀고들어오고 있어요!

1000649210.english: We have to stop them! No matter what it takes!

1000649211.english: Lady Amphitrite! Please circle around with Lady Salacia and strike their flank! We, Horizon, will hold the front line!
1000649211.korean: 엠피트리테 님! 살라시아 님과 함께 우회해서 적 측면을 노려주세요! 전열은 저희 호라이즌이 맡겠습니다!

1000649213.english: It will be difficult... but I’ll leave the front line to you.

1000649215.english: Vice-commander! This time their flagship is coming along as well!
1000649215.korean: 부함장님! 이번에는 기함도 같이 오고 있어요!

1000649216.english: The flagship... even with my main guns...

1000649217.english: ...I-I still have those anti-ship missiles left. With those, somehow, I could...!
1000649217.korean: ...저, 저 대함 미사일 남았거든요? 이걸로 어, 어떻게든...!

1000649218.english: The moment you try to climb into launch angle, the AA guns and interceptors will swat you down in an instant!
1000649218.korean: 지금 발사각 잡겠다고 날아오르면 대공포랑 요격기들한테 순식간에 격추될거야.

1000649219.english: I’m the deckhand here—believe me when I say it.
1000649219.korean: 갑판병인 내가 하는 말이니까 믿어도 좋아.

1000649223.english: We have to disable the flagship somehow!

1000649224.english: Forget the other ships—if that battleship fires its main guns, everyone at the airport will be...!
1000649224.korean: 다른 함선들은 몰라도, 저 전함이 주포를 쏘게 둔다면 공항에 있는 분들은...!

1000649225.english: With our current firepower, sinking it outright is impossible.

1000649226.english: To stop the main guns from firing... we’ll have to land hits on the turrets and damage them.
1000649226.korean: 주포 발사를 막으려면... 주포탑에 함포를 명중시켜서 피해를 주는 수밖에 없습니다.

1000649227.english: Will that even work? That’s the toughest part of the entire ship!
1000649227.korean: 그걸로 되겠어요? 배에서 제일 튼튼한 부분이잖아요!

1000649228.english: The armor’s too thick to pierce, that’s true.

1000649229.english: But with our special high-explosive shells, we can at least jam the mechanism and halt the guns for a short time.
1000649229.korean: 저희가 사용하는 특수 고폭탄이면 짧은 시간이나마 함포의 물리적 작동을 멈출 수 있습니다.

1000649230.english: ...Whether it’ll work on a monster like that, I can’t say.

1000649231.english: ...Yes. Do it. We have no other choice.
1000649231.korean: ...네. 그렇게 해요. 그것 말고는 방법이 없어요.

1000649232.english: The flagship has entered the strait! Just a little further and the airport will be within effective range!
1000649232.korean: 기함이 군도 지역으로 진입했어요! 조금만 더 전진하면 공항이 유효 사거리에 들어와요!

1000649233.english: I’ll target Turret One. Lady Amphitrite and Lady Salacia, please take Two and Three!
1000649233.korean: 제가 1번 포탑, 엠피트리테 님과 살라시아 님이 각각 2번과 3번 포탑을 노려주세요.

1000649234.english: We fire on three! One, two...!

1000649237.english: That wasn’t even its top speed just now...?

1000649238.english: Th-this output is insane. How can something that massive move with such speed and acceleration...?!
1000649238.korean: 마, 말도 안되는 출력이에요. 어떻게 저 덩치에 저런 속도와 가속을...?!

1000649240.english: Looks like it stopped turning—must be disabled!
1000649240.korean: 선회를 멈춘 것으로 보아 무력화된 것 같아요!

1000649241.english: With battleship-class guns like Poseidon’s, even a two-gun salvo could level the entire airport in an instant! We have to stop it!
1000649241.korean: 포세이돈 전함급의 함포면, 두 문의 일제사격으로도 공항 하나쯤은 순식간에 초토화할 수 있습니다! 막아야해요!

1000649243.english: Dragon, did you hear? The flagship just broke through the defensive line!
1000649243.korean: 용, 들었나? 방금 기함이 방어선을 돌파했어.

1000649245.english: Now then—unless you strike me down here and now, not just the airport but all of Vancouver will be reduced to rubble.
1000649245.korean: 자, 어서 나를 공격해서 쓰러뜨리지 않으면 공항은 물론이고 밴쿠버 전체가 쑥대밭이 될거야.

1000649246.english: You can focus only on me now, can’t you...!

1000649247.english: Gamma, get a hold of yourself! If you go that far, there’ll be no turning ba—
1000649247.korean: 감마, 정신차리시오! 그런 짓을 벌였다간 돌이킬 수-

1000649248.english: You’re the one who needs to get a hold of yourself! Where is the Invincible Dragon, the one more warlike and battle-hungry than anyone else?!
1000649248.korean: 너나 정신차려! 누구보다 호전적이고 싸움을 즐기던 무적의 용은 어디로갔지!

1000649249.english: Where is the war-god I once admired?!
1000649249.korean: 내가 동경했던 전쟁의 화신은 어디로 갔냔 말이다!

1000649250.english: I’ve told you countless times—that’s a misunderstanding!

1000649252.english: ...The you standing here now is nothing but a coward, afraid of loss and holding back.
1000649252.korean: ...지금의 너는, 잃는 것이 두려워 몸을 사리는 겁쟁이일 뿐이다.

1000649253.english: See with your own eyes where that path leads.
1000649253.korean: 그 말로가 무엇인지... 네 눈으로 똑똑히 봐라.

1000649255.english: ...As far as I know, the bombardment of Poseidon-class warships never misses its mark.
1000649255.korean: ...소관이 아는 한, 바다를 지배하는 포세이돈 군함의 포격은 빗나가는 법이 없을텐데.

1000649256.english: Especially when commanded by Lemonade Gamma.

1000649258.english: Hmph. Perhaps your subordinates’ fire has thrown the fire control system out of alignment.
1000649258.korean: 글쎄. 네 부하들의 포격 때문에 사통장치가 맛이 갔나보군.

1000649259.english: Still, if I keep firing, something’s bound to hit, don’t you think?
1000649259.korean: 그래도 계속 쏘다보면 뭐라도 맞지 않겠어?

1000649261.english: A surprise attack may have been your only option, but with the firepower you have now, you cannot stop my flagship.
1000649261.korean: 기습하려면 어쩔 수 없었겠지만, 지금 너희가 가진 화력으로는 내 전함을 막을 수 없어.

1000649263.english: To stake everything and come at me—to kill me, Dragon.
1000649263.korean: 모든 걸 걸고 덤벼서, 날 죽이는 거야, 용.

1000649266.english: ...If this keeps up, it might hit the transport...

1000649267.english: ...Miss Orangeade, we need to get the transport airborne now...!

1000649268.english: The refugees are still boarding, it’s too soon!

1000649271.english: Huh? A danger signal... a missile?!

1000649278.english: So this young lady is the one who made such great contributions in this operation?
1000649278.korean: 이쪽 아가씨가 이번 작전에서 혁혁한 공을 세운 분인가?

1000649281.english: Leave the rest to our soldiers and evacuate.
1000649281.korean: 남은 건 우리 군바리들한테 맡기고 대피해.

1000649283.english: Enemy flagship, Annihilator, has opened fire!

1000649284.english: Fortunately, there are no casualties or equipment losses. The shells landed on the edge of the runway!
1000649284.korean: 다행히 인명 및 장비 피해는 없습니다. 활주로 외곽에 착탄했어요.

1000649285.english: - The image of Gamma’s flagship on the screen was far from pristine.
1000649285.korean: - 화면에 띄워진 감마의 기함은 온전한 상태가 아니었다.

1000649286.english: - Its stern gun was wrecked, and black smoke billowed from multiple points on the deck.
1000649286.korean: - 선미 함포는 망가져 있고, 갑판 곳곳에선 검은 연기가 피어올랐다.

1000649287.english: - A battleship is a fortress upon the sea. Even if it looked heavily damaged, sinking it would still be uncertain without inflicting ten times that amount.
1000649287.korean: - 전함은 바다 위의 요새다. 언뜻 큰 피해를 입은 것 같아보이지만, 저런 피해의 10배를 입혀도 가라앉힐 수 있을지 없을지.

1000649288.english: Your Majesty, Gamma’s flagship is preparing to fire again...!
1000649288.korean: 폐하, 감마의 기함이 또다시 포격을 준비하고 있습니다...!

1000649289.english: - With our current firepower, we cannot stop that fortress of the sea. But if we board it with our troops and disable it from within...!
1000649289.korean: - 지금 우리의 화력으로는 저 바다의 성을 막을 수 없다. 하지만 전투원들을 승선시켜서 내부를 무력화한다면...!

1000649291.english: The transport carrying the last group of refugees has just landed, and our combat units are returning one after another.
1000649291.korean: 마지막 난민 그룹을 태운 수송기도 방금 막 착륙했고, 전투원들도 차례로 복귀하고 있어요.

1000649292.english: The enemy’s remaining naval forces, after a reckless charge, are tangled up and nearly encircled by our forces.
1000649292.korean: 적의 남은 해상 세력은 무리한 돌파로 인해 서로 엉킨채 아군에게 반포위당한 상태입니다.

1000649293.english: Under Vice-Commander Sirene’s command, they are being mopped up.

1000649294.english: The Horde is also disengaging from PECS forces and returning, Your Majesty.
1000649294.korean: 호드도 PECS 병력을 따돌리고 귀환중이에요, 폐하.

1000649295.english: At this point, the operation’s success rate stands at over 99%.

1000649297.english: We did it! The operation was a success!

1000649298.english: Now we just need to board the transport and return! It’s all over now!
1000649298.korean: 이제 저희도 수송기를 타고 돌아가면 돼요! 이제 전부 끝이에요!

1000649301.english: ...There’s still something left I must do.

1000649302.english: Miss Orangeade. You asked me to share a room with you, didn’t you...?
1000649302.korean: 오렌지에이드 양. 제게 같은 방에서 지내자고 해주셨죠...?

1000649303.english: Back then, I was too dazed to realize it... but looking back, it made me truly happy. Thank you.
1000649303.korean: 그땐 얼떨떨해서 몰랐는데... 돌이켜보니 굉장히 기뻤어요. 감사해요.

1000649304.english: ...Eheheh. Why are you bringing that up all of a sudden? You’re making me blush!

1000649305.english: So does that mean you’ve decided to live with me? No backing out!
1000649305.korean: 그럼 같이 지내기로 정하신 건가요? 말 바꾸기 없기!

1000649307.english: We’ll definitely live together, Miss Orangeade...

1000649309.english: Where are you going? The transport’s this way. Why are you backing away...
1000649309.korean: 어디 가세요, 수송기는 이쪽이에요. 왜 뒷걸음질을...

1000649310.english: Right now, I can’t go with you...

1000649311.english: The thing I forgot to tell the Commander... you know what I mean...
1000649311.korean: 인간님에게 말씀드리는 걸 깜빡했던 거... 그거 있잖아요...

1000649312.english: The truth is, that was a lie. I was afraid you’d order me back... or worse, that you might choose to stay behind with me...
1000649312.korean: 사실, 거짓말이었어요... 혹시나 명령을 내려서라도 절 복귀시킬까봐... 아니면 함께 남아주실까봐...

1000649313.english: I was terrified you’d see through my lie... that’s why I kept it from you...
1000649313.korean: 제 거짓말을 눈치채실까봐... 그래서 말하지 않았던 거예요...

1000649315.english: You said it could be dealt with easily—wasn’t that true?!
1000649315.korean: 간단하게 끝낼 수 있다고 했잖아요, 아니었어요?!

1000649317.english: The surveillance records update every second... I have to erase them in real time... until the Commander, the refugees, and the resistance are safely out of the network’s reach...
1000649317.korean: 초 단위로 갱신되는 감시 기록을 실시간으로 지워줘야 해요... 감시망에서 인간님이... 난민과 저항군이 빠져나갈 때까지...

1000649321.english: ...I won’t make you wait too long.

1000649322.english: Once everything is over, I promise I’ll come find the Commander... and you, Miss Orangeade.
1000649322.korean: 모든 게 마무리되면, 제가 꼭 인간님을... 오렌지에이드 양을, 찾아갈게요.

1000649323.english: I don’t really read comics, so I’m not sure, but...

1000649324.english: Isn’t this usually the part where people smile as they say goodbye...?
1000649324.korean: 보통 이럴 땐, 서로 웃으면서 보내주지 않나요...?

1000649327.english: I’m just doing what I have to do... no one else can take my place in this.
1000649327.korean: 전 제가 해야 할 일을 하는 거예요... 저 말고는 아무도 이 일을 대신할 수 없어요...

1000649328.english: Miss Orangeade, you have your own part that only you can play...
1000649328.korean: 오렌지에이드 양은 오렌지에이드 양만이 할 수 있는 일을 해주세요...

1000649329.english: Just like you helped me, please help the refugees...
1000649329.korean: 제가 도움을 받았던 것처럼, 난민분들을 도와주세요...

1000649331.english: You know I can’t help but leave if you say it like that...!
1000649331.korean: 그렇게 말하면 제가 두고 갈 수 밖에 없단 걸 알고 계시잖아요...!

1000649334.english: But promise me just one thing.

1000649335.english: That you’ll come back—no matter what!

1000649337.english: I’ll come back to see you again.

1000649340.english: Then... until next time, Miss Orangeade.

1000649345.english: Annihilator and Triton were taken out...?

1000649347.english: They're not insects. They're crew of the Orca.

1000649350.english: The flagship has been neutralized, and the fleet—having lost its head and at less than half strength—is surrounded.
1000649350.korean: 기함은 무력화됐고, 함대는 머리를 잃고 반도 안되는 전력에 포위당해있지.

1000649351.english: If you still intend to keep fighting me, I'll indulge you. I still have enough strength left to take your head!
1000649351.korean: 그래도 나와 계속 싸울 생각이라면, 어울려주겠소. 아직 소관의 목을 칠 여력은 남아있을테니.

1000649353.english: Your mockery of the defeated is a bit too scathing.

1000649356.english: I'll ask once more: will you follow me and join the resistance?
1000649356.korean: ...다시 한 번 묻지. 소관을 따라, 저항군에 합류하지 않겠소?

1000649358.english: Think it over. Whenever—? What's that...?

1000649362.english: All turrets have been neutralized, Gamma.

1000649365.english: So you’re going to stay like this until the very end?

1000649366.english: Fine, then I’ll give up too. But in exchange…!
1000649366.korean: 좋아, 그렇다면 나도 포기하겠어. 그 대신...!

1000649368.english: ...! The flagship’s energy signature… no way…!

1000649369.english: Emergency situation! We must stop Gamma before he causes the fusion reactor to go critical!
1000649369.korean: 긴급상황이오! 감마가 핵융합로를 폭주시키기 전에 막아야 하오!

1000649370.english: I’ll eliminate everything that makes you weak. After that…
1000649370.korean: 널 약하게 만드는 것들은 내가 모조리 없애주겠어. 그 다음에...

1000649374.english: Gather all personnel available for immediate deployment. Now!
1000649374.korean: 지금 바로 투입할 수 있는 인원을 모아줘. 당장!

1000649376.english: - A sudden emergency alarm sent a stir through the temporary command post.
1000649376.korean: - 비상 경보음과 함께 임시 지휘소가 술렁였다.

1000649377.english: - The tactical map, showing the surrounding terrain, was now dotted with bright red points.
1000649377.korean: - 주변 지형을 담은 작전 지도에 새빨간 점들이 가득 찍혀 있었다.

1000649378.english: Most units will return to the command post within ten minutes. Only the Armored Maidens at the airport and the Horde inland remain.
1000649378.korean: 대부분 10분 안에 임시 지휘소로 복귀할 예정이고, 공항의 아머드 메이든과 내륙의 호드만 남아있습니다.

1000649380.english: Horizon and her fleet have also broken off engagement and are on their way back. Master, you must return to the Orca at once.
1000649380.korean: 호라이즌과 휘하 함대도 교전을 중지하고 복귀 중이니, 주인님도 어서 오르카 호로 돌아가셔야 해요.

1000649381.english: - As I turned to leave the temporary command post, one of the reconnaissance feeds displaying areas near the city caught my eye.
1000649381.korean: - 임시 지휘소에서 발길을 돌리려는 중, 도시 인근 지역을 비추는 여러 정찰 영상 중 하나가 내 눈길을 끌었다.

1000649383.english: On screen appeared a Iron Bug designated “Speaker,” surrounded by a swarm of its kind.
1000649383.korean: - 스피커라고 명명한 철충과, 그 주위에 무리지어 있는 철충들의 모습이 화면에 떠올랐다.

1000649384.english: - I had seen this sight before, but this time, something was different...
1000649384.korean: - 저번에도 본 적 있는 장면이지만, 이번엔 무언가...

1000649385.english: A new sun has risen! Bow your heads and receive Him, O subjects!
1000649385.korean: 새로운 태양이 떠올랐다! 신민들은 고개를 조아려 그분을 맞이해라!

1000649387.english: Yes. A new sun has risen. Bow your heads and receive Him, O subjects...
1000649387.korean: 네. 새로운 태양이 떠올랐다. 신민들은 고개를 조아려 그분을 맞이해라...

1000649388.english: When I checked Orca’s logs, it was recorded that only you, Commander, could hear the words of the Iron Bugs...
1000649388.korean: 제가 오르카 호의 기록을 확인했을 때, 철충의 말은 사령관님만 들을 수 있는데다가...

1000649389.english: - As if to mock what I had just said, the “voice” of the Speaker continued to flow from the screen.
1000649389.korean: - 그런 내말을 비웃기라도 하듯, 화면 속에서는 계속해서 스피커의 '목소리'가 흘러나왔다.

1000649390.english: The order of the world shall be remade beneath His feet! Give thanks for His teaching, you ignorant ones!
1000649390.korean: 세계의 질서는 그분의 발 아래에 재편되리라! 무지한 자들을 그분의 가르침에 감사하라!

1000649391.english: Those who do not follow His will— Kieegh!
1000649391.korean: 그분의 뜻에 따르지 않는 자는- 키엑!

1000649392.english: It’s being... attacked by another Iron Bug...?

1000649393.english: Among the swarm around the Speaker, a Iron Bug designated “Harvester” brought its massive arm crashing down on it.
1000649393.korean: - 스피커의 주위에 모여들어 있던 철충들 중, '하베스터'라고 명명된 철충이 스피커를 육중한 팔로 내려쳤다.

1000649394.english: - And at that signal... the Parasites erupted into a frenzied battle.
1000649394.korean: - 그것을 신호로... 철충들은 맹렬한 전투를 시작했다.

1000649396.english: Not only here—reports show the same thing happening at other reconnaissance points nearby.
1000649396.korean: 이곳뿐만이 아니라, 근방의 다른 정찰 지점에서도 같은 일이 벌어지고 있어요.

1000649397.english: Even the remaining PECS forces are under attack; it seems the Parasites are striking without distinguishing friend or foe.
1000649397.korean: 잔존 PECS 병력도 공격받는걸로 봐선, 피아 구분 없이 마구 공격하는 것 같아요.

1000649398.english: - On the tactical map, the sea showed almost no Parasites. If the Armored Maidens departed right now, they should be able to return safely. But...
1000649398.korean: - 정찰 지도상 바다 쪽에는 철충이 거의 없다. 아머드 메이든도 바로 출발한다면 무사히 돌아올 수 있겠지. 하지만…

1000649399.english: - On the map, the marker for Horde’s unit was still blinking, far inland.
1000649399.korean: - 전술 지도, 호드의 부대 마크는 아직도 내륙 깊은 곳에서 깜빡이고 있었다.

1000649404.english: It’s fine... it’s not too late yet...

1000649406.english: In the crossfire between nearby Iron Bugs, a stray grenade struck the comms server room, and Yumi lost consciousness from the blast.
1000649406.korean: - 인근 철충들이 상잔을 벌이다 발사된 유탄이 통신망 서버실을 직격했고, 유미는 그 충격으로 정신을 잃었다.

1000649407.english: - How much time had passed? As Yumi barely opened her eyes, she saw a blurry figure reflected in the glow of the monitor.
1000649407.korean: - 얼마나 시간이 지났을까, 간신히 눈을 뜬 유미의 시야에 모니터 불빛에 비친 흐릿한 인영이 보였다.

1000649409.english: Don’t just lie there. Get up.

1000649410.english: I can’t handle this alone anymore.

1000649412.english: Look at my face. You know who I am.

1000649416.english: Once they realize this chaos has broken out, Omega will—
1000649416.korean: 지금 이 사단이 난 걸 알면 오메가님-

1000649418.english: Omega will stop at nothing to chase the humans down and drown them all.
1000649418.korean: 오메가가 무슨 수를 써서든 인간을 쫓아가서 전부 수장시켜 버리겠지.

1000649419.english: ...You know that better than anyone, don’t you?

1000649421.english: I'll help. We have to stop this at all costs.

1000649422.english: Do as you want. I’m exhausted.

1000649425.english: Hah, who knows. What do you think?
1000649425.korean: 글쎄, 어떻게 될까. 너는 어떻게 생각해?

1000649427.english: Omega, who lost Cestus Hymas. And Lady Beta, whose position crumbled quickly after Alpha’s betrayal.
1000649427.korean: 케스토스 히마스를 잃어버린 오메가. 알파가 배신하는 바람에 급격히 입지가 약화된 베타 님.

1000649428.english: On top of that, Lady Beta’s Cestus Hymas is the most similar to Omega’s—aside from Alpha’s.
1000649428.korean: 게다가 베타 님의 케스토스 히마스는, 알파를 제외하면 오메가의 것과 가장 유사해.

1000649429.english: What will happen to her is obvious.

1000649431.english: Just now, the human fleet moved out of our detection range.
1000649431.korean: 방금 인간의 분함대가 우리 감지 범위를 벗어났어.

1000649437.english: I’ll stop Lady Omega’s tyranny! No matter what it takes—
1000649437.korean: 저는 오메가님의 악행을 막겠어요. 무슨 수를 써서라도-

1000649440.english: You and I share the same purpose. The results may differ, but the goal is the same.
1000649440.korean: 너와 내 목적은 같아. 그에 따른 결과는 달라질지도 모르지만.

1000649441.english: You know you can’t do anything about her alone. You know Omega better than anyone, don’t you?
1000649441.korean: 너도 너 혼자서 어떻게 해 볼수는 없을 거야. 알잖아? 오메가는 네가 제일 잘 아니까.

1000649443.english: Of course, I’m not forcing you.

1000649444.english: Choose. You. Whether to follow me or not.

1000649448.english: After the Invincible Dragon departed, Gamma spent a while laying waste to the city, watching the Iron Bugs tearing into each other and the resistance fleet detachments slipping out through the strait toward the open sea.
1000649448.korean: - 무적의 용이 떠난 뒤, 감마는 한동안 도시를 마구 파괴하며 서로 싸우는 철충들과 해협을 빠져나가 바다로 향하는 저항군의 분함대를 바라보고 있었다.

1000649450.english: Should’ve brought at least that adjutant along.
1000649450.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 부관 녀석이라도 데려올 걸 그랬군.

1000649451.english: All ships! Divert all power to the anti-air batteries! Any vessels still in port, cast off immediately and regroup the fleet!
1000649451.korean: 전 함대! 모든 동력을 대공포로 돌려라! 아직 정박중인 함선은 즉시 출항해서 함대를 재편한다!

1000649452.english: Ground forces, pull back and regroup—only hold the key positions!
1000649452.korean: 지상 병력은 후퇴 후 재집결, 중요 거점만 사수해!

1000649455.english: - After Armored Maiden, all transports and troops were split between the Orca and Dragon’s ship and evacuated from the area.
1000649455.korean: - 아머드 메이든을 마지막으로 모든 수송기와 병력을 오르카 호와 용의 함선에 나눠태우고 지역을 벗어났다.

1000649456.english: We’ll need to hear the details from Captain Dragon the Invincible, but for now Gamma is not pursuing us.
1000649456.korean: 자세한 것은 무적의 용 대장님에게 이야기를 들어야 하겠지만, 일단 감마가 저희를 쫓지는 않고 있습니다.

1000649457.english: We are heading north at full speed from the eastern side of the mountain range that runs along the coast.
1000649457.korean: 해안가를 따라 이어진 산맥 동쪽에서 전속력으로 북상중입니다.

1000649458.english: Taking into account the Iron Bugs’ movements and the terrain, we are calculating the rendezvous point...
1000649458.korean: 철충들의 움직임과 지형을 고려해 합류 지점을 계산중입니다만...

1000649459.english: At Cardinal Armand’s words, I checked the tactical map.

1000649460.english: - Around the unit marker showing the Horde’s position, red dots were densely packed.
1000649460.korean: - 호드의 위치를 표시하는 부대마크 주위로, 빨간 점들이 빽빽하게 늘어서 있었다.

1000649461.english: About 500 km northwest from the Horde’s current position, there is a river running along a valley.
1000649461.korean: 현재 호드의 위치로부터 북서쪽으로 약 500km 떨어진 지점에, 계곡을 따라 강이 흐르고 있습니다.

1000649462.english: The estuary is wide, allowing our ships to advance somewhat inland.
1000649462.korean: 하구가 넓어 아군 함선도 내륙으로 다소 들어갈 수 있습니다.

1000649463.english: I zoomed in on the area around the estuary Cardinal Armand had mentioned.
1000649463.korean: - 아르망이 언급한 하구 주변 지리를 확대하여 살펴봤다.

1000649464.english: Though the passage was narrow enough that the fleet would have to pass single-file, there weren’t many Iron Bugs nearby. For a short time, it was a suitable place to dock and pick up the Horde.
1000649464.korean: - 함대가 일렬로 지나가야 할 만큼 좁은 길목이어도 주변에 철충들이 많지 않았다. 짧은 시간 동안은 정박해서 호드를 태우기 적합한 위치였다.

1000649465.english: - While checking the unit roster to decide which troops to land, Alpha rushed into the bridge in a hurry.
1000649465.korean: - 지상에 상륙할 병력을 정하기 위해 대원 현황을 파악하고 있을 때 알파가 다급한 모습으로 함교에 들어왔다.

1000649466.english: Master, we just received an emergency transmission from Lady Prester Johanna!
1000649466.korean: 주인님, 방금 전에 요안나 양으로부터 긴급 통신이 들어왔어요!

1000649467.english: Judging from the “words” we heard from the Speaker earlier, it’s no exaggeration to say that something has gone wrong with all the Iron Bugs. Which means...
1000649467.korean: - 조금전, 스피커의 '말'을 들어봤을때, 모든 철충들에게 이상이 생겼다고 생각해도 무리가 아니다. 그렇다는건…

1000649468.english: They’re barely holding out by taking advantage of defensible terrain, but...
1000649468.korean: 대부분 방어하기 좋은 지형이라 가까스로 막아내고는 있습니다만…

1000649469.english: Speaking quickly, I scanned the map. For now, somewhere we can avoid as many Iron Bugs as possible...
1000649469.korean: - 말을 하며 급히 지도를 살폈다. 일단 최대한 철충을 피할 수 있는 곳으로…

1000649470.english: The northern shore of Saint Lawrence Island, near the Bering Strait. Confirmed.
1000649470.korean: 베링 해협 인근의 세인트 로렌스 섬 북안. 확인했어요.

1000649471.english: Your Majesty, the Horde has replied that they will head immediately to the designated location.
1000649471.korean: 폐하, 호드로부터 즉시 지정해주신 곳으로 향하겠다는 답변이 왔습니다.

1000649472.english: Yes, Your Majesty. We will make preparations at once!

1000649473.english: Troops landed from the Orca at the river estuary, but the Horde had not managed to cover even half of their planned distance due to the Iron Bug attacks.
1000649473.korean: - 강의 하구로 진입한 오르카 호에서 부대가 상륙했지만, 호드는 철충들의 공격에 예상 이동 거리의 반도 이동하지 못했다.

1000649474.english: The landed forces are waiting at the rendezvous point, while the Horde is still on the move.
1000649474.korean: 상륙한 부대는 약속 지점에 도착해서 대기중이고, 호드는 여전히 이동중이에요.

1000649475.english: Khan the Swift and the Horde are still holding out well, but there are limits to their ammunition and stamina.
1000649475.korean: - 칸과 호드는 여전히 잘 버텨주고 있지만, 탄약과 체력에는 한계가 있다.

1000649476.english: To bring them safely back to the Orca, the scale of the force we send will have to be larger, which means they’ll face an even greater swarm of Iron Bugs.
1000649476.korean: - 그들을 무사히 오르카까지 데려오려면 보내야 하는 부대의 규모도 커지고, 그러면 더욱 더 큰 규모의 철충과 싸우게 된다.

1000649477.english: The mountains are rugged, but not impassable.

1000649478.english: While anxiously waiting for Cardinal Armand to draw up an operational plan from the terrain data, a communication request came in from outside.
1000649478.korean: - 초조하게 지형 정보를 통해 작전 계획을 세우는 아르망을 기다리는 중에, 외부에서 통신 요청이 들어왔다.

1000649480.english: - Even though my words came out with a slightly sarcastic tone, Eva didn’t so much as raise an eyebrow.
1000649480.korean: - 나도 모르게 나온 다소 빈정거리는 말투에도 에바는 눈썹 하나 까딱하지 않았다.

1000649481.english: You could say that. I told you, didn’t I? I’m here to help you, Commander.
1000649481.korean: 그렇다고 할 수 있죠. 말했잖아요? 저는 사령관, 당신을 돕는다고.

1000649482.english: The situation isn’t exactly relaxed, so I’ll get straight to the point. Could you call Prototype Labiata?
1000649482.korean: 상황이 여유롭지 않으니까 본론부터 말할게요. 라비아타를 불러주시겠어요?

1000649484.english: ...Indeed, if it were me, I could break through the Iron Bugs and link up with the Horde.
1000649484.korean: ...확실히, 저라면 철충들을 돌파해서 호드와 합류할 수 있어요.

1000649485.english: Facing Prototype Labiata, Eva advised not to land troops to retrieve the Horde, but to send Prototype Labiata to join them instead.
1000649485.korean: - 라비아타와 마주한 에바는 부대를 상륙시켜 호드를 복귀시키는 것이 아니라, 라비아타를 보내 호드에 합류시킬 것을 권했다.

1000649486.english: Yes. In the past, maybe not, but as you are now, it’s possible.
1000649486.korean: 그래. 예전이라면 모르겠지만 지금의 너라면 가능해.

1000649487.english: If you hadn’t received that treatment, you’d barely even be able to stand right now.
1000649487.korean: 그때 치료를 받지 않았다면, 지금은 몸을 가누기도 힘들었을 테니까.

1000649488.english: I recalled how Eva had once given me a hint that led to Prototype Labiata’s treatment.
1000649488.korean: - 에바가 라비아타를 치료할 수 있는 힌트를 알려주었던 일이 떠올랐다.

1000649489.english: I won’t deny it. But what I said back then was the truth.
1000649489.korean: 부정은 하지 않을게요. 하지만 그때 한 말은 진심이었어요.

1000649490.english: The means just happened to align with two of my objectives.
1000649490.korean: 제 목표 중 두 가지를 이루기 위한 수단이 일치했던거죠.

1000649491.english: Just as much as was necessary.

1000649492.english: - I sensed from her casual reply that she had no intention of telling me any more.
1000649492.korean: - 가벼운 대답에서 더이상 말해주지 않겠다는 의도가 느껴졌다.

1000649493.english: Still, you’ve grown quite a lot since I last saw you. If I may say so, that strike you landed on Omega surprised even me.
1000649493.korean: 그래도 안 본 동안 꽤나 성장하셨네요. 하나 말씀드리자면, 오메가에게 한 방 먹인 그 수에는 저도 놀랐어요.

1000649494.english: - After silently gazing at me for a while, one corner of Eva’s lips curled upward ever so slightly.
1000649494.korean: - 한동안 말없이 나를 바라보던 에바의 한쪽 입꼬리가 살짝 올라갔다.

1000649495.english: Well, fine. Then move without delay.
1000649495.korean: 뭐, 좋아요. 그럼 늦지 않게 움직이세요.

1000649496.english: Once Prototype Labiata joins the Horde, I’ll contact you again. At that time, I’ll tell you what needs to be done.
1000649496.korean: 라비아타가 호드와 합류하면 다시 연락할게요. 그때, 무엇을 해야하는지 알려드리죠.

1000649497.english: - After the transmission ended, Alpha, who had quietly been listening to my conversation with Eva, opened her mouth.
1000649497.korean: - 통신이 끊기고 조용히 에바와 나의 대화를 듣고 있던 알파가 입을 열었다.

1000649499.english: I can’t jump to conclusions since this is the first time I’ve seen it for myself, but as she said herself, it’s clear that she has other motives.
1000649499.korean: 직접 본 건 처음이라 속단할 수 없겠지만, 본인이 직접 말했듯이 다른 목적이 있다는 건 확실해요.

1000649500.english: And we can’t be sure that purpose won’t harm you.
1000649500.korean: 그리고 그 목적이 주인님께 해가 되지 않을 거라고 단정할 수 없죠.

1000649501.english: Still… the smaller goals she’s pursued to reach her own have always ended up helping you.
1000649501.korean: 그래도... 그 목적을 이루기 위한 작은 목적들은 지금껏 주인님께 도움이 되었어요.

1000649502.english: I gave the order for the landed units to return, then turned my gaze to Prototype Labiata.
1000649502.korean: - 상륙해있던 부대에 복귀 지시를 내리고 라비아타에게 시선을 주었다.

1000649504.english: - While the relationship can be described as friendly for now, I can’t let my guard down as long as I don’t know what the other person is thinking.
1000649504.korean: - 일단은 우호적이라고 할 수 있는 관계이지만, 상대의 의중을 알 수 없는 이상 마음을 놓을 수는 없다.

1000649505.english: You’re right. I’ll convene a staff meeting to prepare for this operation.
1000649505.korean: 맞는 말씀이세요. 참모 회의를 소집해서 이번 작전에 대한 대비를 해둘게요.

1000649506.english: And also for what comes afterward.

1000649507.english: Yes, Master. Leave it to me.

1000649509.english: Around here it’s almost all... ugh?!

1000649510.english: Careful. Like the Commander said, even the larvae have turned aggressive.
1000649510.korean: 조심해. 사령관이 말씀해주신 것처럼 유충도 공격적으로 변했어.

1000649512.english: It’s cleared, let’s keep moving. Be careful not to draw the Iron Bugs’ attention.
1000649512.korean: 정리됐으니 계속 이동하죠. 철충들의 주의를 끌지 않도록 조심하세요.

1000649514.english: Ah, Captain—Vice-Commander. You did call in the other Strikers as well, right?
1000649514.korean: 아, 대장- 부사령관님. 다른 스트라이커즈 부대원들도 호출하신 거 맞죠?

1000649516.english: Yes. It was a special order from the Commander.

1000649517.english: Given the situation it’ll take time, but they’ll be joining us soon.
1000649517.korean: 상황이 상황인 만큼 시간은 걸리겠지만, 곧 합류할거예요.

1000649518.english: They’ll make it safely, right? They’re setting out from practically the heart of the Iron Bugs’ nest in the continent...
1000649518.korean: 무사히 도착할 수 있겠죠? 철충의 본거지나 다름 없는 대륙 한복판에서 출발할텐데...

1000649519.english: Of course. They’re as strong and dutiful in their roles as Lancer Mina and X-00 Tiamat.
1000649519.korean: 그럼요. 미나랑 티아멧만큼이나 강하고 맡은 바 역할에 충실한 분들이니까요.

1000649521.english: Hehe, do you still find it hard to deal with me?

1000649524.english: You’re not going to bring up that crocodile story again, are you? I’ve heard it nearly a hundred times now...
1000649524.korean: 그 악어 이야기 또 하려구요? 슬슬 백 번을 향해 가는 것 같은데...

1000649525.english: That’s how shocking it was! You put a live crocodile on my bed while I was asleep. When I rolled off in terror, you were right there laughing your head off...
1000649525.korean: 그만큼 놀랐으니까 그렇죠... 자고 있는 제 침대 위에다 살아있는 악어를 갖다 놨었잖아요. 제가 놀라서 침대에서 떨어지니까 옆에서 깔깔 웃고...

1000649526.english: Who puts a live crocodile at a sleeping comrade’s bedside?! Then just laughs when they tumble off in fright.
1000649526.korean: 자고 있는 동료의 머리맡에 살아있는 악어를 갖다 놓는 사람이 어디있어요? 깜짝 놀라서 굴러떨어지니까 옆에서 깔깔 웃기나 하고.

1000649527.english: ...Mine was an ocean sunfish in a tank.

1000649528.english: I thought I was going to faint when I woke up in the middle of the night and our eyes met...
1000649528.korean: 밤에 자다 깨서 눈이 마주치고 기절하는줄 알았어...

1000649529.english: Even if you say you're doing it because you like me... Ugh...

1000649530.english: That kid can be a bit of a troublemaker. But when he’s with the rest of the team—oh, did I say that?
1000649530.korean: 그 아이가 조금 짓궂긴 해요. 그래도 다른 부대원들이랑 같이 있으면- 어머, 이 소리?

1000649531.english: Sounds like the Horde. When I checked the map a little while ago, they were way farther out, but in that time...?
1000649531.korean: 호드 분들인 것 같은데요? 조금 전에 지도 확인했을 때는 엄청 멀리있었는데 그 사이에...?

1000649532.english: They’re in combat. Let’s go, quickly!

1000649533.english: Well, Vice-Commander, I could cry from joy seeing you.

1000649534.english: Just ran out of my last magazine!
1000649534.korean: 마침 딱 마지막 탄창을 다 쓴 참이었어.

1000649535.english: Same here, all my grenades are gone so I was stuck firing this boring auto-shotgun!
1000649535.korean: 나도 폭탄이 다 떨어져서 이 재미없는 자동 샷건이나 쏘고 있었는데!

1000649536.english: By any chance, did you bring liquor? And some snacks?

1000649537.english: Uh... we only brought ammo and rations...

1000649539.english: G-grenades, yes. The Commander told us to pack plenty.
1000649539.korean: 포, 폭탄은 있죠. 사령관님이 잔뜩 챙겨가라고 하셨어요.

1000649541.english: Kahaha! That’s our Commander! Just as crazy as me!
1000649541.korean: 캬하핫! 여억~시 우리 사령관이야. 나만큼이나 이상해!

1000649542.english: Oh, but you did bring cigarettes? My favorite kind, too.
1000649542.korean: 오, 그래도 담배는 있네. 내가 좋아하는 걸로.

1000649544.korean: 아뇨! 그런건 없을 거예요. 없어야 해요!

1000649547.english: Thanks for coming. I told the Commander not to worry, but truth is, it was a close call.
1000649547.korean: 와줘서 고맙군. 사령관에게는 걱정 말라고 했지만 실은 아슬아슬한 상황이었어.

1000649550.english: Just a moment ago. She’s still such an enigma.
1000649550.korean: 방금 전에. 여전히 종잡을 수 없는 여자다.

1000649552.english: How have you been, Khan the Swift?

1000649553.english: I don’t think we’re close enough to be exchanging such greetings.
1000649553.korean: 그렇게 반갑게 인사를 나눌만한 사이는 아닌 것 같군.

1000649554.english: Don’t you think it’d be better for us wraiths who’ve lived over a century to get along?
1000649554.korean: 백 년도 넘게 살아온 망령들끼리, 좀 친하게 지내는 게 좋지 않겠어?

1000649555.english: Those who live with a purpose aren’t called wraiths.
1000649555.korean: 목적을 갖고 살아가는 이들을 망령이라고 부르진 않지.

1000649557.english: Heh, a shame. I thought at least with you I could have a good relationship...
1000649557.korean: 후후, 유감이네. 다른 사람이면 몰라도 너랑은 좋은 사이가 될 수 있을 거라고 생각했는데...

1000649558.english: Eva, just as you said, we’ve linked up with the Horde.

1000649559.english: Before you tell us what to do next, I want to ask one thing.
1000649559.korean: 이제 우리가 뭘 해야 하는지 알려주기 전에 하나만 물어볼게요.

1000649560.english: What’s your real goal? Why vanish for so long only to reach out to us now?
1000649560.korean: 당신의 진짜 목적이 뭐죠? 왜 한동안 연락하지 않다가 이제와서 또 접촉해오는 건가요.

1000649561.english: Even if I told you honestly, would you believe me?
1000649561.korean: 내가 솔직하게 목적을 말한다 해도 믿겠어?

1000649564.english: Isn’t it easier to deceive when you mix lies into the truth?
1000649564.korean: 진실에 거짓을 섞는 게 더 속이기 쉽지 않겠나.

1000649565.english: That trick is far too transparent.

1000649566.english: Still, fine. I can tell you at least that much.
1000649566.korean: 그래도 뭐, 좋아. 그 정도야 얼마든지 말해줄 수 있지.

1000649567.english: But before that, answer me first, Prototype Labiata. You asked what you thought was important—so why didn’t you call the Commander here to hear it together?
1000649567.korean: 하지만 그 전에 내가 묻는 것부터 먼저 답해. 라비아타. 너는 네가 중요하다고 생각하는 걸 물어봤으면서 왜 사령관을 불러 같이 들으려고 하지 않지?

1000649568.english: Because I first need to determine whether what you say is truth or lies.
1000649568.korean: 당신이 말하는 게 진실인지, 거짓인지부터 파악해야 하니까요.

1000649569.english: Isn’t that the Commander’s judgment to make? Are you saying you’ll stand in for them?
1000649569.korean: 그걸 판단하는 게 사령관의 재량이잖아? 네가 그걸 중간에 대신하겠다는 거야?

1000649570.english: Lightening my Master’s burdens is part of my role.
1000649570.korean: 주인님의 업무를 덜어드리는 것도 제 역할 중 하나예요.

1000649571.english: I doubt that’s a role the Commander assigned you.
1000649571.korean: 그 역할을 사령관이 부여한 건 아닐 것 같은데.

1000649572.english: It only looks like overprotection. Didn’t you ever think that might be wrong? Or perhaps…
1000649572.korean: 과보호로밖에 보이질 않아. 잘못됐다는 생각은 들지 않았어? 아니면 혹시...

1000649573.english: Could it be that you don’t trust the Commander?

1000649575.english: Even before the Doomsday War, Eva, I saw many people like you.
1000649575.korean: 멸망전쟁 전에도 에바, 당신 같은 사람을 많이 봤지.

1000649577.english: They only ever asked questions, never gave clear answers.
1000649577.korean: 상대에게 질문만 하고 정확한 답을 가르쳐주지 않더군.

1000649578.english: They let the other wander in doubt, draw all kinds of conclusions, yet never said if they were right.
1000649578.korean: 상대가 의문 속을 헤매며 다양한 결론을 내놓게 하지만, 맞는지 아닌지는 알려주지 않아.

1000649579.english: Because the point wasn’t the answer, it was making the other doubt themselves.
1000649579.korean: 그게 중요한 게 아니라 상대방이 스스로를 의심하게 만드는 게 목적이니까.

1000649580.english: From the beginning, it was a question with no answer. Isn’t that right, Eva?
1000649580.korean: 애초에 답이 없는 질문이었는데. 그렇지 않나, 에바?

1000649581.english: As I thought… your values and mine are very different.

1000649582.english: I can tell you have a hidden purpose, and that you’re trying to conceal it.
1000649582.korean: 당신에게 숨겨진 목적이 있고, 그걸 감추려 한다는 걸 알겠어요.

1000649583.english: But remember this: if that purpose so much as harms my Master in the slightest…
1000649583.korean: 하지만 명심해두세요. 만약 그 목적 때문에 조금이라도 주인님에게 해를 끼친다면...

1000649584.english: I'll make sure that you pay the right price.

1000649585.english: Huhu, is that a threat you’re giving me?

1000649586.english: I’m only telling you in advance what I will do.
1000649586.korean: 제가 할 일을 미리 말씀드리는 것뿐이에요.

1000649587.english: Yes, that makes sense. If you had spoken that as some kind of intimidation, I would’ve been disappointed.
1000649587.korean: 그래, 그렇겠지. 그걸 위협이랍시고 내뱉은 거라면 오히려 실망했을 거야.

1000649588.english: And Khan the Swift the Swift.

1000649590.english: You said earlier I asked a question with no answer. You’re wrong. It was a question with its answer already set.
1000649590.korean: 아까 내가 답이 없는 질문을 던졌다고 했는데, 틀렸어. 이미 답이 정해져 있는 질문이거든.

1000649591.english: Prototype Labiata, protecting the Commander is not your role. There’s someone else meant for that.
1000649591.korean: 라비아타, 사령관을 보살피는건 네 역할이 아냐. 그 역할을 맡을 사람은 따로 있지.

1000649593.english: Don’t tell me you mean yourself? On what grounds…
1000649593.korean: 설마 자신이 그 역할이라는 건가요? 대체 무슨 근거로...

1000649594.english: Didn’t I say it earlier? Even if I told you the truth, could you believe it? Now, as you said, discern it for yourself.
1000649594.korean: 아까 내가 말했잖아? 솔직하게 말해도 믿을 수 있겠냐고. 이제 네가 말했던 것처럼 분별해봐.

1000649595.english: If your doubts are cleared, then you should keep the promise you made at the start, shouldn’t you?
1000649595.korean: 궁금증이 다 해소됐으면 처음에 했던 약속을 지켜야겠지?

1000649598.english: Sorry to intrude on the touching reunion, but I’ll speak first.
1000649598.korean: 감동의 재회 중에 끼어들어서 미안하지만, 먼저 할 말부터 할게요.

1000649599.english: Commander, you must immediately head for the Svalbard Islands through the Arctic Ocean.
1000649599.korean: 사령관, 당신은 지금 즉시 북극해를 통해 스발바르 제도로 향하세요.

1000649600.english: There are several reasons, but above all, it’s the safest place in the world for the Resistance right now.
1000649600.korean: 몇 가지 이유가 있는데, 일단 그곳은 현 시점에서 저항군에게 세상에서 가장 안전한 곳이에요.

1000649601.english: You’ve stirred up America this much—Omega won’t sit idle.
1000649601.korean: 아메리카를 그렇게 들쑤셔 놨으니, 오메가가 가만히 있지는 않겠죠?

1000649602.english: And there, you’ll find the “Ark of Memory.” From the moment humanity began recording its history until the eve of its ruin, everything is preserved there. And finally…
1000649602.korean: 그리고 거기엔 '기억의 방주'도 있어요. 인류가 기록이라는 행위를 시작했을 때부터, 멸망하기 전까지의 모든 역사가 보관된 곳이죠. 마지막으로...

1000649604.english: Huhu, I’ve said it before… You still haven’t been punished enough.
1000649604.korean: 후후, 전에 했던 얘기인데... 당신은 아직 덜 혼났어요.

1000649606.english: - Perhaps it was just my imagination, but there was a tinge of loneliness in Eva’s smile.
1000649606.korean: - 기분 탓인지 모르겠지만 에바의 미소에서 쓸쓸하다는 느낌을 받았다.

1000649607.english: I’ll continue. Send Prototype Labiata and Khan the Swift to the Ruins of the Iron Throne.
1000649607.korean: 계속할게요. 라비아타와 칸은 철의 왕자의 유적으로 보내세요.

1000649608.english: That’s all I have to say. Then, until the next time we can make contact.
1000649608.korean: 할 말은 여기까지에요. 그럼, 다시 연락할 수 있게 될때 봐요.

1000649609.english: - Eva finished what she had to do and cut off the communication.
1000649609.korean: - 에바는 자신이 할 만만 마치고 통신을 끊어버렸다.

1000649610.english: - The Ruins of the Iron Throne… they’re near Anchorage. Not far from where we are now, but the only way to describe it is dangerous.
1000649610.korean: - 철의 왕자의 유적이라면 앵커리지 근교다. 지금 우리가 있는 곳과 멀지 않은 곳에 위치해있지만, 위험하다고 밖에 설명할 수 없는 곳이었다.

1000649611.english: It was the site where the Irregular known as the Iron Prince had appeared. With the Iron Bugs rampaging now, there’s no telling what might happen there again.
1000649611.korean: - 철의 왕자라는 이레귤러가 발생했던 장소인데, 철충이 날뛰는 지금 또 어떤 일이 일어날지 모른다.

1000649612.english: If it’s near Anchorage, I’ve been there before. No problem carrying out the mission.
1000649612.korean: 앵커리지 근교라면 가봤던 장소다. 작전 수행에는 문제 없지.

1000649613.english: Master, Eva has never lied so far.
1000649613.korean: 주인님. 에바는 여태까지 거짓말은 하지 않았었어요.

1000649614.english: It was true when she told me where Amina's inheritance was, too.
1000649614.korean: 아미나의 유산의 위치를 가르쳐줬을 때도 진실이었죠.

1000649616.english: Enemies who thrash about without reason or judgment can’t even become a true threat.
1000649616.korean: 사리분별도 하지 못하고 날뛰는 적 따위, 위기 비슷한 것도 되지 않지.

1000649617.english: At my words, Khan the Swift smiled faintly.
1000649617.korean: - 내 말에 칸은 빙그레 미소를 지었다.

1000649618.english: Thank you for trusting me, Commander.

1000649619.english: We’ll be apart for quite a while, but I promise to return safely with the troops.
1000649619.korean: 꽤 오래 떨어져있게 되겠지만, 부대원들과 함께 무사히 돌아가겠다고 약속하겠다.

1000649621.english: In my stead, the Sisters will attend to you.

1000649622.english: Anyone would think we were parting forever. I’ll keep in touch regularly.
1000649622.korean: 누가 보면 영원히 작별하는 줄 알겠군. 정기적으로 연락하겠다.

1000649623.english: Then… until we both return safely.

1000649624.english: I received the nearby operation map from Master.

1000649625.english: The terrain is rough, but in the long run, moving along the coastline seems best. What’s your opinion, Vice-Commander?
1000649625.korean: 지형이 험하긴 해도 장기적으로 봤을때 해안선을 따라 움직이는 게 좋을 것 같은데, 부사령관의 의견은 어떻지?

1000649626.english: I agree. Besides, there don’t seem to be many Iron Bugs crossing the mountain range toward the sea, so we can focus entirely on movement.
1000649626.korean: 저도 동의해요. 거기에 산맥을 넘어서 바다 쪽으로 오는 철충도 거의 없는 것 같으니까 움직이는데에만 전념할 수 있을 거예요.

1000649627.english: Then let’s keep heading north and first scout this large basin east of Anchorage.
1000649627.korean: 계속 북상하다 여기, 앵커리지 동쪽의 커다란 분지에서 먼저 정찰을 해보는 게 좋겠어요.

1000649629.english: Next, when we enter the ruins—

1000649631.english: Before this operation started, I watched a movie and…
1000649631.korean: 내가 이번 작전 시작하기 전에 영화를 하나 봤는데...

1000649636.english: What do you think? That you always borrow her guns and never return them.
1000649636.korean: 뭐긴 뭐야. 맨날 총 빌려가서 안 가져온다고 했겠지.

1000649637.english: Good call. You really shouldn’t lend her anything.
1000649637.korean: 잘 생각했어. 얘한테 뭐 빌려주면 안 돼.

1000649638.english: Aw, come on~ sharing is caring!

1000649639.english: Only for you, not for anyone else.

1000649644.english: Hey, Feather! What did you just show her!

1000649645.english: Kyahaha, welcome to the doorstep of adulthood!
1000649645.korean: 캬하핫, 어른의 문턱에 한 발 걸친걸 환영해.

1000649649.english: Look at this kid. That reaction’s so cute and fresh.

1000649650.english: Were you really not interested in this stuff at all?

1000649651.english: Hmph, I figured it was a rite of passage to becoming a fine wife...
1000649651.korean: 후, 훌륭한 아내가 되려면 거쳐야 하는 관문이라고는 생각했는데요...

1000649652.english: I... I’d be happy just being hugged...

1000649653.english: Too much advance studying just backfired, huh.

1000649654.english: As I thought, things like this are best done pow! — before you even realize what’s happening.
1000649654.korean: 역시 이런건 파바밧! 하고, 정신을 차리기도 전에 끝내버리는 게 좋다고.

1000649655.english: So that pow! of yours is what left the Commander’s shoulder all bloody, huh?
1000649655.korean: 그렇게 파바밧! 해서 사령관님 어깨를 피투성이로 만들어 놓으셨나?

1000649656.english: It wasn’t that bad! I just kinda... nibbled on him without thinking—
1000649656.korean: 그정도는 아니거든! 그냥 나도모르게 살짝 잘근잘근 깨물었는데-

1000649657.english: Wait, when did you even mark him? You want me to scold you?

1000649658.english: That’s a violation of the rules, you know.

1000649662.english: Still, they’re not bad-natured, so there shouldn’t be any problem working together on the mission.
1000649662.korean: 그래도 천성이 나쁜 애들은 아니니까, 같이 작전하는데에는 문제 없을거야.

1000649663.english: Yes. I’ll be counting on you.

1000649664.english: Me too. Heheh, I feel like I’ll get along with you quickly, Camel.
1000649664.korean: 저도 잘 부탁드려요. 헤헷, 카멜 씨랑은 그래도 금방 친해질 수 있을 것 같아요.

1000649665.english: Naturally. Those girls would have to be the weird ones.

1000649668.english: That thing Feather showed you earlier...

1000649671.english: Looks like we’re just about done here.

1000649672.english: Yes. The rest we can discuss while on the move, and adjust as needed along the way.
1000649672.korean: 네. 나머지는 이동하면서 이야기하고, 그때그때 맞춰가는 수밖에요.

1000649673.english: Then let’s depart immediately, Deputy Commander Prototype Labiata.

1000649675.english: Yes. I’ll be counting on you.

1000649676.english: Boss! Look at this! The Commander turns bright red just from being seen bare-bodied, it’s so cute!
1000649676.korean: 대장! 얘네봐! 사령관님 맨몸만 봐도 얼굴 새빨개지는 게 엄청 귀여워!

1000649677.english: ......My apologies. I’ll make sure they’re cautioned.

1000649679.english: After finishing communications with Prototype Labiata, Khan the Swift, and Eva, I headed toward the rendezvous point.
1000649679.korean: - 라비아타, 칸, 에바와의 통신을 마치고 약속 지점으로 향했다.

1000649680.english: - Ships carrying the troops began arriving one by one... and a familiar face I hadn’t seen in a long time came to greet me.
1000649680.korean: - 대원들을 태운 배가 하나 둘 도착했고... 오랜만에 보는 반가운 얼굴이 나를 맞아주었다.

1000649682.english: - Johanna’s courteous bow was just as it had always been.
1000649682.korean: - 정중하게 예를 취하는 요안나의 모습은 예전과 다름없었다.

1000649683.english: That was nothing at all. It was simply tending the garden for the sake of you and our future.
1000649683.korean: 그정도는 아무것도 아니네. 주군과 우리의 미래를 위한 텃밭을 가꾸는 일이었으니.

1000649684.english: If anything... I feel ashamed that I couldn’t protect what we had built up until now.
1000649684.korean: 오히려... 그동안 쌓아올린 것들을 지켜내지 못해서 면목 없을 따름일세.

1000649685.english: - Ashamed? Far from it. Johanna had safely led most of the rear personnel here.
1000649685.korean: - 면목 없기는 커녕, 요안나는 대부분의 후방 인원들을 이곳으로 무사히 인도했다.

1000649686.english: - A few scattered groups had also been contacted, and units had already been dispatched to escort them.
1000649686.korean: - 일부 떨어진 인원들도 곧 연락이 닿았고, 호송을 위한 부대가 출격한 상태다.

1000649687.english: I’ll take your words deeply to heart, my liege.
1000649687.korean: 주군의 말, 마음 속 깊이 새기겠네.

1000649688.english: - For a while, I caught up with Johanna on everything we hadn’t spoken of.
1000649688.korean: - 한동안 요안나와 그동안 하지못한 이야기를 나눴다.

1000649689.english: - Just as nearly all the rear personnel had arrived, noisy voices echoed down the corridor.
1000649689.korean: - 거의 모든 후방 인원이 도착할때쯤, 복도에서 시끌시끌한 목소리가 들려왔다.

1000649690.english: Whoaah, awesome! So this is the bridge!

1000649691.english: I only ever saw over Commander’s and Alpha’s shoulders during communications!
1000649691.korean: 통신할때 사령관님이랑 알파 님 어깨 너머로만 봤었는데!

1000649692.english: Waaah~! You can see under the sea!

1000649693.english: Can we go out from here? Shia wants to swim!
1000649693.korean: 여기서 나갈 수 있어? 시아, 수영하고 싶어!

1000649694.english: Shia, you like swimming? Want to do it with me later?
1000649694.korean: 시아 수영하는 거 좋아해? 나중에 언니랑 같이 할까?

1000649696.english: Shia loves swimming and loves the ocean too!

1000649697.english: Shia! What if you run off alone like that!

1000649698.english: Ah, you must be her sister? Shia was with me for a bit.
1000649698.korean: 아, 언니분이시죠? 시아는 제가 잠깐 데리고 있었어요.

1000649699.english: I-I’m sorry. I looked away just for a moment and...
1000649699.korean: 죄, 죄송합니다. 잠깐 한눈을 판 사이에 그만...

1000649702.english: - At last, Orangeade spotted me and came running, holding Salacia’s hand.
1000649702.korean: - 마침내 나를 발견한 오렌지에이드가 살라시아의 손을 잡고 달려왔다.

1000649704.english: Heheh, no, it’s just—turns out my guess was right~
1000649704.korean: 히힛, 아뇨. 그냥 내 생각이 맞았구나~ 해서요.

1000649708.english: Forgive me for the delay in reporting back.

1000649710.english: Ehehe, Emphi-sis, you’re way too stiff~

1000649712.english: That’s right. You don’t need to be so stiff. Our Commander is generous, you know.
1000649712.korean: 맞아요. 너무 딱딱하게 하실 필요 없어요. 저희 사령관님이 얼마나 도량이 넓으신데요.

1000649715.english: Haa... guess there’s no helping it...

1000649716.english: What can I do, I’m just too competent~

1000649717.english: Commander, may I ask you something?

1000649718.english: I heard you’re heading to Europe through the Arctic Ocean. Is that true?
1000649718.korean: 북극해를 통해 유럽으로 향하신다고 들었는데, 사실인가요?

1000649719.english: You may not remember, but Shia and I also came from Europe. And related to that, there are some things... I should tell you.
1000649719.korean: 기억하실지 모르겠지만, 저와 시아도 유럽에서 왔습니다. 그리고 그와 관련해서 몇 가지... 드릴 말씀이 있습니다.

1000649721.english: Yes. It’s about Lemonade Delta, who controls that region.
1000649721.korean: 네. 그 방면을 장악하고 있는, 레모네이드 델타에 관해서입니다.

1000649722.english: - Quite some time has passed since I first opened my eyes, but the resistance’s sphere of activity has mostly been limited to East Asia and the Pacific.
1000649722.korean: - 내가 눈을 뜬 후 꽤나 시간이 지났지만, 저항군의 활동 범위는 동아시아와 태평양 인근으로 한정되어 있었다.

1000649723.english: Since Prototype Labiata’s resistance activities overlapped with that area too, most of the surviving Bioroids we ran into responded favorably.
1000649723.korean: - 거기에 라비아타의 저항군 활동 범위와 겹치기도 해서, 마주치게 되는 생존 바이오로이드들은 대체로 우호적인 반응을 보였다.

1000649724.english: - But on the opposite side of the world... all I’ve had were fragmented bits of information about Europe.
1000649724.korean: - 하지만 지구 반대편... 유럽에 대한 정보는 단편적인 것들 뿐.

1000649725.english: Yep! I’ll summon Alpha and the other staff officers and commanders then!
1000649725.korean: 넵! 그럼 알파 님이랑 다른 참모, 지휘관 분들을 소집하겠습니다!

1000649726.english: - I gave a nod to Orangeade, who was assisting with work so naturally, and rose from my seat.
1000649726.korean: - 너무 자연스럽게 업무 보조를 하는 오렌지에이드에게 고개를 끄덕여주고 의자에서 몸을 일으켰다.

1000649729.english: Damn, again...! Report on the troop evacuation status!
1000649729.korean: 젠장, 또...! 병력 대피 상황 보고해!

1000649730.english: Tell them to hurry as much as possible. What about Dragon?

1000649732.english: Can you zoom in on that for a second?

1000649734.english: Cardinal Armand, can you hear this too?

1000649735.english: I had to listen myself to understand.
1000649735.korean: 나도 직접 들어야만 알아들을 수 있었어.

1000649737.english: ...Then it's not the worst-case scenario for now.

1000649739.english: It must be because of the Iron Bugs. How's the Horde?

1000649741.english: Alright. Tell them to meet there.

1000649743.english: Broadcast to all bases. Even if you have to abandon everything, make sure everyone gets out alive…!
1000649743.korean: 모든 거점에 전파해. 전부 다 버려도 좋으니까 몸만 성히…!

1000649744.english: Send the coordinates of this island and have everyone gather there. Not a single person left behind.
1000649744.korean: 이곳. 이 섬의 좌표를 전달하고 전부 거기서 집결하는걸로 해. 한 명도 빠짐없이.

1000649745.english: We need to prepare a landing force. We'll also break through towards the Horde.
1000649745.korean: 상륙할 부대를 준비해야겠어. 우리도 호드 방향으로 돌파할거야.

1000649748.english: First, plan to supply ammo to the Horde. Is that possible?
1000649748.korean: 일단 호드에게 탄약을 보급할 계획을 짜줘. 가능하겠어?

1000649750.english: ...Are you here to solve things again this time?

1000649752.english: Then the one who helped us back then was...

1000649754.english: Because there's something we have to protect now.

1000649757.english: Escort the transport drones and join Khan with the Strikers.
1000649757.korean: 수송 드론들을 호송해서 칸에게 합류해줘. 스트라이커즈랑 같이.

1000649758.english: We need to hear what they have to say. We can decide whether to accept it later.
1000649758.korean: 무슨 말을 할 지 들어봐야지. 받아들일지 말지는 그때 결정해도 늦지 않아.

1000649759.english: Still... we can't just recklessly attack an opponent who has us in the palm of their hand.
1000649759.korean: 그래도... 우릴 손바닥 위에 올려둔 상대에게 섣불리 덤벼들 수도 없는 노릇이야.

1000649760.english: Got it. Then... Prototype Labiata, I'm counting on you.

1000649762.english: That sounds like my line, but... no issues here.
1000649762.korean: 그건 내가 할 얘기인 것 같지만... 이쪽은 문제 없어.

1000649765.english: I wish you'd be more specific.

1000649766.english: I don't want to keep playing twenty questions. Tell me your purpose.
1000649766.korean: 더 이상 스무 고개하고 싶지 않아. 네 목적을 말해.

1000649768.english: Khan, Prototype Labiata. We're heading to our current location...

1000649772.english: Yeah. Come back safely. No need to overexert yourself.
1000649772.korean: 응. 무사히 돌아와. 무리할 필요는 없으니까.

1000649773.english: Glad you're safe. You've been through a lot.

1000649774.english: No, I told you. Even if we have to abandon everything, just come back safe.
1000649774.korean: 아냐, 말했잖아. 다 버려도 좋으니까 무사하기만 해달라고.

1000649775.english: We can rebuild the infrastructure. I can't afford to lose you all just for that.
1000649775.korean: 인프라는 다시 만들면 그뿐이야. 고작 그것 때문에 너희를 잃을 순 없어.

1000649778.english: I'm fine. No need to be so stiff.
1000649778.korean: 괜찮아. 너무 딱딱하게 할 필요 없어.

1000649779.english: Sorry. Looks like Orangeade will be out on field duty again...
1000649779.korean: 미안. 오렌지에이드는 다시 외근일 것 같은데...

1000649780.english: We need to keep an eye on PECS's movements.

1000649785.english: We should have a quick meeting. There's still some time before we depart.
1000649785.korean: 잠깐 회의를 하는게 좋겠어. 아직 출발할 때까진 시간이 있으니까.

1000649788.english: Watching you grow day by day makes me truly happy, but I was also sad thinking you might leave my arms... The Master I once thought was just a child has somehow grown into a wonderful adult. Thank you so much for growing up well and giving me your love. I will always hold you close by your side whenever you need.
1000649788.korean: 하루하루 주인님이 성장하는 모습을 보면서, 정말 기쁘지만 제 품을 떠나실 것 같아서 슬프기도 했는데…&n어린아이라고만 생각했던 주인님은 어느샌가 훌륭한 어른으로 자라셨군요. 이렇게 잘 자라주고,&n저에게 사랑을 베풀어주셔서 정말 감사해요. 언제라도 주인님의 곁에서 꼭 끌어안아 드릴게요.​

1000649789.english:
So you like this outfit that much, Commander?
Huh? It’s not the outfit… it’s me?
Uu… I like you too, Commander.
I was going to say I’d be your maid forever… but no.
Right now, I’m not your maid or your deputy…
Just as a girl… I love you.
So… will you stay with me today too?
1000649789.korean: 역시 주인님이 이런 마음을 품으실 정도로 이 옷이 마음에 드시는 거죠?​ 네? 의상 때문이 아니라… 저라서? 으으...&n저도 주인님을 정말 좋아해요. 평생 주인님만을 위한 메이드가- ...아뇨. 이 순간만큼은 메이드도 부함장도 아니라…&n한 명의 여자아이로써, 저도 사령관님을 사랑하고 있어요.  그러니... 오늘도 저와 함께해 주실 거죠?

1000649790.english: The ring… Neri likes the Commander too, but my heart is pounding so much I can’t think straight… Master, tell Neri what to do... Neri do whatever you want? Really okay? Then… because this outfit still makes me shy, hold me tight and hug me and I’ll feel better. Hehe…
1000649790.korean: 반지구나... 네리도, 네리도 사령관을 좋아하는데, 가슴이 너무 두근거려서 제대로 생각할 수 없단 말이야…&n주인...님, 네리가 어떻게 해야 하는지 알려줘... 네리가 하고 싶은 대로? 정말 괜찮아?&n그럼… 네리, 이 옷 때문에 아직 부끄러우니까. 꼬옥하고 안아주면 괜찮아질 것 같아. 헤헷…

1000649791.english: - It's been several months since we launched an information war against PECS with the cooperation of Alpha, OrangeAid, and Yumi, who was Omega's aide.
1000649791.korean: - 알파와 오렌지에이드, 그리고 오메가의 부관이었던 유미의 협력을 받아 PECS에 정보전을 건지 몇 달째.

1000649792.english: - It has already been weeks since we launched a surprise attack on Vancouver Island to escort refugees who wanted to defect.
1000649792.korean: - 귀순하겠다는 난민들을 호송하기 위해서 밴쿠버 섬에 기습을 감행한지는 벌써 주 단위의 시간이 흘렀다.

1000649793.english: - Gamma intervened even before the operation began, and it almost ended in failure...
1000649793.korean: - 작전을 개시하기도 전에 감마가 난입해서 하마터면 실패로 돌아갈 뻔했지만...

1000649794.english: - Zeta's factory, whose location was unknown, got involved, and when Gamma's flagship tried to self-destruct, it was a crisis, but somehow we managed to escort the refugees.
1000649794.korean: - 소재가 파악되지 않았던 제타의 공장이 개입해 오고, 감마의 기함이 자폭하려 했을 땐 위기였는데 어떻게든 난민들을 호송할 수 있었다.

1000649795.english: The abnormal behavior of The Iron Bugs still bothers me.
1000649795.korean: - 철충들이 보인 이상현상이 아직도 맘에 걸린다.

1000649796.english: - The ferocity of attacking the Bioroids that were staying still first, and on top of that, the Iron Bugs fought each other...
1000649796.korean: - 가만히 있던 바이오로이드를 먼저 공격하는 흉포성, 그리고 같은 철충끼리 상잔을 벌인 데다가...

1000649797.english: - The speaker said It was a new sun.

1000649798.english: - There is no doubt that a new existence appeared and caused changes in the Iron Bugs.
1000649798.korean: - 새로운 존재가 등장해서 철충들에게 변화가 일어난 건 틀림 없다.

1000649799.english: - The reason why my squad and I understood the Iron Bugs' language through the screen and why various unusual phenomena occurred is likely the same.
1000649799.korean: - 나와 대원들이 화면 너머로 철충의 말을 알아들은 것도, 갖가지 특이현상이 일어난 것도 모두 같은 이유에서일 것이다.

1000649800.english: - If their behavior principles have changed from before, then the sea can no longer be considered a safe place, just in case...
1000649800.korean: - 이전까지와 행동원리가 변했다면, 만에 하나 바다도 안전한 장소라 볼 수 없으니...

1000649801.english: - Had to quickly wrap up the front line with PECS forces.
1000649801.korean: - PECS 세력과의 전선을 서둘러 정리해야 했다.

1000649802.english: - Left the captain's quarters to attend the scheduled demonstration.
1000649802.korean: - 예정된 시연에 참석하기 위해서 함장실을 나섰다.

1000649804.english: - To head to the Svalbard Islands, where Eva said the "Ark of Memories" is located, we had to pass through the Arctic Ocean.
1000649804.korean: - 에바가 말한 '기억의 방주'가 있는 스발바르 제도로 향하기 위해선 북극해를 지나가야 했다.

1000649805.english: - The submarine Orca was less restricted by various ice floes and icebergs, but the detachment fleet made up of regular warships was different. The risk of sinking was very high.
1000649805.korean: - 잠수함인 오르카 호는 각종 유빙과 빙산에 제약을 덜 받았으나 일반 전함들로 이뤄진 분함대는 달랐다. 침몰할 가능성이 매우 높았다.

1000649806.english: - Equipped with radar and icebreaking devices, breaking through flat ice, we docked at a nameless island in the Arctic Ocean for navigation equipment inspection and to demonstrate the new AGS.
1000649806.korean: - 레이더와 쇄빙 장치를 장착해서 평탄빙을 깨며 나아가던 중, 항해 장비 점검 겸 신규 AGS의 시연을 위해서 북극해의 이름 없는 섬에 정박했다.

1000649809.english: Here, look. It's just been completed.

1000649810.english: - Triton stood in the middle of the snowy field, watched by me, the commanders of each unit, and everyone else. After a moment, light shone into its eyes and it began to move.
1000649810.korean: - 나를 포함해 각 부대의 지휘관, 그리고 모든 이들이 지켜보는 설원 한가운데에 트리톤이 서있었다. 잠시 후, 안광에 빛이 들어오고 움직인다.

1000649811.english: Multipurpose heavy-class decisive weapon, the extreme firepower model Triton.
1000649811.korean: 다목적 중장형 결전병기, 극대화력 모델 트리톤.

1000649813.english: It has fully recreated the hydrogen bomb used by Poseidon and the multi-weapon control system.
1000649813.korean: 포세이돈이 사용하던 수소폭탄과 다중 화기 제어 시스템을 전부 재현했어요.

1000649814.english: Hehe, well, I just made it because I liked it.
1000649814.korean: 후후, 뭘요. 제가 좋아서 만든 걸요.

1000649815.english: - As I just said, Triton was made because Azaz liked it.
1000649815.korean: - 방금 말한 것처럼 트리톤은 아자즈가 좋아서 만든 거였다.

1000649817.english: - While navigating the Arctic Ocean, the Orca was deciding its course when I met Azaz walking down the corridor.
1000649817.korean: - 한창 북극해를 항해하던 중. 오르카 호가 나아갈 방향을 고민하며 복도를 걷다 아자즈와 마주쳤다.

1000649821.english: - I called out to Azaz who was about to walk past.
1000649821.korean: - 그대로 지나쳐 가려는 아자즈를 불러 세웠다.

1000649823.english: - The request form Azaz handed over included the blueprints of the weapon I had seen recently.
1000649823.korean: - 아자즈가 건네준 요청서에는 얼마 전에 봤던 병기의 설계도가 첨부되어 있었다.

1000649825.english: I used the Poseidon technology I learned while working at PECS, the incomplete blueprints obtained through intelligence, and analyzed the hydrogen conversion device obtained from the recent battle with Triton to create it.
1000649825.korean: PECS에서 활동했을 때 익힌 포세이돈의 기술과 첩보로 얻어낸 불완전한 설계도, 그리고 이번 트리톤과의 전투에서 얻은 수소전환 장치를 분석해서 제작했죠.

1000649826.english: Simply put, I designed it in reverse.

1000649827.english: - Just by looking at the documents, Azaz requested a considerable amount of parts and materials.
1000649827.korean: - 서류만 보면 아자즈는 상당한 양의 부품과 자재를 요청했다.

1000649828.english: - While it's manageable with current resources, the technology's stability hasn't been verified yet and further research is necessary...
1000649828.korean: - 현재 보유 자원으로 감당할 수는 있지만, 아직 기술의 안정성도 검증되지 않았고 추가적인 연구가 필요하니...

1000649829.english: - Just as I was about to consult with the staff, a sense of unease overwhelmed me.
1000649829.korean: - 참모진들과 상의해보려던 찰나, 불안한 기운이 엄습했다.

1000649832.english: The drive-linked display is not ready yet. The color blindness support feature is not fully implemented.
1000649832.korean: 구동 연동 디스플레이는 아직이에요. 색약 대응 기능이 덜 구현됐거든요.

1000649833.english: Hehe, I will make it soon and demonstrate.

1000649834.english: Last time, it was handwritten, wasn't it?

1000649835.english: This time, I definitely followed the dedicated form.

1000649839.english: It's one of the essential procedures designed in the black box.
1000649839.korean: 블랙박스에 설계된 필수 절차 중 하나예요.

1000649840.english: You just need to register the commander's voice.

1000649841.english: - While the squad watched, I walked up to Triton standing in the snowy field.
1000649841.korean: - 대원들이 지켜보고 있는 가운데, 나는 설원에 선 트리톤의 앞까지 걸어갔다.

1000649843.english: Registering command authority with the recognized voice waveform.

1000649847.english: Input command, interpretation error. Waiting for new command input.
1000649847.korean: 입력된 명령, 해석 오류. 새로운 명령 입력, 대기 중.

1000649848.english: Commander, you need to speak simply to Triton.

1000649849.english: Instead of relationship-oriented phrases like "please take care of it," say things like "destroy the snowy mountain" or "strike the target area."
1000649849.korean: 잘 부탁한다는 관계지향적인 발언보다 설산을 파괴하라, 표적 지역을 타격하라는 식으로요.

1000649850.english: That's how Poseidon's basic design was made.

1000649851.english: But it's okay. I installed a deep learning module, so the algorithm will improve soon.
1000649851.korean: 하지만 괜찮아요. 제가 딥러닝 학습장치를 달아놨으니 금방 알고리즘이 개선될 거예요.

1000649852.english: I had some spare time, so I made a few improvements. Besides this...
1000649852.korean: 시간이 남아서 조금 개선해봤어요. 이것 말고도...

1000649854.english: Oh my, looks like it's starting to activate.

1000649855.english: - As the command input was delayed while talking with Azaz, Triton's operating sounds grew louder.
1000649855.korean: - 아자즈와 대화하느라 명령 입력이 지연되자 트리톤의 가동음이 커졌다.

1000649857.english: How about we start with a bombardment demonstration first?
1000649857.korean: 일단 포격 시연부터 먼저 해보는게 어때요?

1000649858.english: - Perhaps because it was originally a sparsely populated area, or because they were fighting among themselves, no Iron Bug signals were detected nearby.
1000649858.korean: - 원래부터 인구가 희박한 지역이었기 때문인지, 자기들끼리 싸우고 있어서인지 주변에서 철충 신호는 감지되지 않았다.

1000649859.english: - I pointed toward one of the snowy mountains located on the opposite side of the island and issued the command.
1000649859.korean: - 섬 반대편에 위치한 설산 중 하나를 가리키며 명령했다.

1000649860.english: Command input, confirmed. Target, acquired. Combat order, approved.
1000649860.korean: 명령 입력, 확인. 표적, 발견. 전투명령, 승인.

1000649862.english: - Soon, the rockets and missiles loaded on Triton were fired incessantly.
1000649862.korean: - 곧 이어 트리톤에 적재되어 있던 로켓과 미사일이 쉴 새 없이 발사됐다.

1000649863.english: - The snowy mountain I had pointed at with my fingertip was engulfed in black clouds and carved away in an instant, disappearing completely without a trace shortly afterward.
1000649863.korean: - 내가 손가락 끝으로 가리켰던 설산은 검은 구름에 휩싸여 순식간에 깎여나갔고, 얼마 지나지 않아 흔적도 없이 사라졌다.

1000649864.english: Hehe, it's too early to be surprised.

1000649865.english: Poseidon's AGS isn't limited to Triton alone.

1000649870.english: Other units couldn't obtain the key components.
1000649870.korean: 다른 기체는 핵심 부품을 구하지 못했으니까요.

1000649871.english: At the very least, if they could see the blueprints of the core systems, or even have broken pieces like this Triton, they could restore it, but without that, it's going to be difficult.
1000649871.korean: 하다못해 핵심 계통의 설계도를 보기라도 하거나, 이번 트리톤처럼 부서진 조각이라도 있으면 복원할 수 있지만, 그런거 없이는 조금 힘들어요.

1000649873.english: We mentioned that there's an "Ark of Memories" in the Svalbard Archipelago, right?
1000649873.korean: 이번에 저희가 가는 스발바르 제도에 '기억의 방주'가 있다고 했잖아요?

1000649874.english: If we were to find new blueprints or modules there…
1000649874.korean: 만약 거기서 새로운 설계도나 모듈을 발견한다면...

1000649875.english: Of course. We could manufacture it even more powerfully than originally designed.
1000649875.korean: 물론이죠. 본래 설계됐던 것보다 더 강력하게 제조할 수 있어요.

1000649876.english: - Another reason to head to the Svalbard Archipelago has arisen.
1000649876.korean: - 스발바르 제도에 가야 할 이유가 하나 더 늘었다.

1000649878.english: Existing command: bombardment order. Currently proceeding with annihilation.
1000649878.korean: 기존의 명령, 포격 명령. 현재 섬멸 진행 중.

1000649879.english: Check remaining munitions of loaded weapons. Ammunition present, confirmed.
1000649879.korean: 적재된 화기의 잔존 여부 검사. 잔탄 존재, 확인.

1000649883.english: Because the trigger was changed from a bombardment stop command to ammunition depletion.
1000649883.korean: 트리거를 포격 정지 명령어가 아니라 탄약 소진으로 변경했으니까요.

1000649885.english: - Triton's demonstration showed positive potential, including the possibility of power enhancement.
1000649885.korean: - 트리톤의 시연은 전력 확충 가능성을 포함해 긍정적인 가능성을 보여줬다.

1000649886.english: - Amid the unending sound of bombardment, today I learned one lesson.
1000649886.korean: - 끊이질 않는 포격음 속에서, 오늘 나는 한 가지 교훈을 얻었다.

1000649887.english: - From now on, Azaz's requests and blueprints must be carefully examined with reference to expert opinions.
1000649887.korean: - 앞으로 아자즈의 요청서와 설계도는 전문가들의 의견을 참고해 꼼꼼히 따져봐야 된다는 것을.

1000649888.english: The intended goal has been achieved.

1000649893.english: Yes. Was there any problem during preparation?

1000649903.english: Got it… no, wait a moment.

1000649905.english: You haven't finished making it all already, right?

1000649908.english: If that's the case, then why the request form…
1000649908.korean: 아니, 그럴 거면 대체 왜 요청서를...

1000649913.english: I look forward to working with you.

1000649915.english: Isn't that a bit too formal?

1000649916.english: I don't think I saw anything like that in the blueprints…
1000649916.korean: 그런 내용은 설계도에서 못 본 것 같은데...

1000649922.english: Good. That will be a huge help. What's the next unit to restore? We need to rewrite the operation plan—
1000649922.korean: 좋아. 큰 도움이 되겠어. 다음으로 복원할 기체는 뭐야? 작전 계획을 다시 짜야-

1000649924.english: Uh… weren't we supposed to start right away?

1000649928.english: Alright, let's end the demonstration and head back. Quickly—

1000649930.english: Was there never a bombardment stop command for Triton?
1000649930.korean: 혹시 트리톤에 포격 정지 명령은 원래부터 없어?

1000649934.english: This for me? Why? I can’t stay alone, I frown because I can’t see well, I’m just a nuisance… It’s not that I dislike it. I can now sleep with the Commander and not have nightmares. Um… Commander, can I have your hand for a moment? …Even if I can’t see your hand well, it’s really big and warm. I want to feel the Commander’s warmth every day. So you won’t leave me alone anymore, right? Promise?
1000649934.korean: 이걸 나한테? 대체 왜? 난 혼자 있지 못하고, 가까운 것도 잘 안 보여서 찡그리고 다니고, 귀찮기만 할 텐데… 싫은 건 아니야.&n나도 사령관이랑 같이 자면서, 악몽도 꾸지 않고 푹 잘 수 있게 됐는걸. 음… 사령관. 잠시 손 좀 줄래? …사령관의 손, 잘 보이지&n않아도 정말 크고 따뜻해. 매일 이렇게 사령관의 온기를 느끼고 싶어. 그러니까, 더는 나를 혼자 두지 않을 거지? 약속이야?

1000649935.english: Even though I love and adore you, I was clumsy and didn’t know how to express it, so my feelings couldn’t reach you… Today I feel like my feelings reached the Commander and I’m happy... Do you know how much trouble I took to sing this song for you? My calluses and blisters... I feel like everything is repaid today. ...Be by my side for life, Commander.
1000649935.korean: 좋아하고 사랑해도, 어떻게 표현하는지 몰라서... 서툴러서, 내 마음이 전해지질 않아 어쩔 줄 몰랐는데…&n오늘에야 내 마음이 사령관에게 전해진 것 같아 기뻐... 내가 이 노래 들려주려고 얼마나 고생했는 줄 알아?&n굳은살도 배기고, 물집까지 잡혀서... 오늘 모든 걸 보상받은 것 같네. ...평생 내 곁에 있어줘, 사령관.​

1000649936.english: Hehe... In a past life too, you and this one were bound as husband and wife. It should have been the same experience as now, and yet this one's heart pounds and one's face feels as if it might burst open like a touch-me-not blossom. ...Do you need an answer? As this one said before, this one swears an unchanging love through all the ages. From this moment on, as you are this one's, so too is this one yours.
1000649936.korean: 후후... 전생에서도 그대와 첩은 부부의 연을 맺었지. 지금과 똑같은 경험이었을 터인데 심장은&n두방망이질 치고 얼굴은 봉선화처럼 톡 터질 것 같구나. ...대답이 필요한 것이더냐? 일전에 첩이 말했듯&n미래영겁 변치 않을 사랑을 맹세하마. 지금부터 그대가 첩의 것이듯이, 첩 또한 그대의 것이니라.

1000649937.english: I just acted on my feelings and you like it so much. There are plenty of people more charming than me, yet you like me—Commander, you’re really something special. ...That sounded uncool. I’m truly glad the Commander loves me more than others, that my charm has captured your heart. Shall we continue? Let us pledge eternity for the two of us...
1000649937.korean: 그저 마음 가는 대로 행동했을 뿐인데 이렇게나 좋아할 줄이야. 저보다 더 매력있는 사람이 널렸는데도 제가 좋다니,&n사령관은 정말 특이한 사람이군요. ...멋없는 소리를 했네요. 사령관이 다른 사람보다도 저를 좋아해줘서,&n제 매력이 사령관의 마음을 사로잡을 수 있어서 정말 기뻐요. 그럼 마저 할까요? 우리 두 사람을 위한 영원의 서약을...

1000649938.english: - It was one of those ordinary days, without any special events or dangerous incidents.
1000649938.korean: - 특별한 행사 없이, 위험한 사고 없이 평범한 나날 중 어느 날이었다.

1000649939.english: - Handling work as usual, just like any other day.
1000649939.korean: - 여느 때와 다르지 않게 업무를 처리하자니.

1000649940.english: - After sitting in the same position for hours, my whole body felt stiff. As I stretched, a warm cup of coffee was offered from beside me.
1000649940.korean: - 몇 시간 동안 같은 자세로 앉아있어서 온몸이 찌뿌둥했다. 기지개로 스트레칭하는데 옆에서 따뜻한 커피를 내밀었다.

1000649942.english: I'm worried you might collapse from overwork again.
1000649942.korean: 이러다 또 과로로 쓰러지는 게 아닐까 우려되는구나.

1000649944.english: - At first, being clumsy with work and often lost in daydreams, the help… was very, very slight.
1000649944.korean: - 처음엔 업무가 서툰 데다가 공상에 빠지는 일이 잦아서 도움이... 아주 조금 도움이 됐지만.

1000649945.english: - Now, having grown accustomed to the work, they fully handled their share. Responding to various tasks, they are far more reliable than before.
1000649945.korean: - 일에 익숙해진 지금은 한 사람 몫을 톡톡히 해냈다. 각종 업무에 대응해줘서 이전과는 비교도 안 될 정도로 믿음직하다.

1000649946.english: - But there's one thing that lingers on my mind…

1000649949.english: I just called out to you.

1000649950.english: - As I try to focus on work again, I hear Hirume's laughter.
1000649950.korean: - 다시 업무에 집중하려는데 히루메의 웃음소리가 들린다.

1000649954.english: - They've been calling me every few minutes since this morning... What on earth is going on...?
1000649954.korean: - 아침부터 분 단위로 날 부르고 있는데... 대체 무슨 일이지...?

1000649955.english: Alright, my dear. Did you want to call me too?
1000649955.korean: 그래, 그대여. 그대도 첩을 불러보고 싶었느냐?

1000649957.english: You know very well, don't you?

1000649958.english: Now, let's finish the work first. Time is fiNight, after all.
1000649958.korean: 자, 어서 업무부터 끝내자꾸나. 시간은 유한한 법이니.

1000649959.english: - Contrary to my expectation that she would explain in more detail, Hirume remained tight-lipped.
1000649959.korean: - 좀 더 자세히 설명해 줄 거란 예상과 달리 히루메는 말을 아꼈다.

1000649960.english: - I'm really bothered by all these stares coming my way... At this rate, I won't be able to finish my work even if I work all day.
1000649960.korean: - 계속 날아와 꽂히는 시선이 엄청 신경 쓰이는데... 이러다간 하루 종일 해도 일을 못 끝내겠군.

1000649962.english: - In the end, work finished just a little faster than before.
1000649962.korean: - 결국 업무시간은 이전보다 아주 조금 빨리 끝났다.

1000649963.english: That's enough for today's tasks. Good work, my dear.
1000649963.korean: 금일 과업은 여기까지구나. 고생 많았다, 그대여.

1000649965.english: Hehe, was that earlier some kind of revenge?

1000649966.english: - Come to think of it, Orca's regular inspection isn't far off. The necessary documents are already prepared, so only approval is needed.
1000649966.korean: - 생각해 보니 오르카 호의 정기 점검이 얼마 남지 않았구나. 필요한 서류는 미리 작성해뒀으니 결재만 하면 된다.

1000649967.english: - Since I can finish it quickly on my own anyway, Hirume can leave early.
1000649967.korean: - 어차피 나 혼자서도 금방 끝날 일이니 히루메는 일찍 돌려보내도 되겠지.

1000649969.english: You knew too. That today is the day.
1000649969.korean: 그대도 알고 있었구나. 오늘이 그날이라는 것을.

1000649970.english: Understood. I also have preparations to make, so I'll go first and wait.
1000649970.korean: 알겠다. 첩도 준비해야 할 게 있으니 먼저 가서 기다리마.

1000649972.english: - Before I could ask anything, Hirume left the captain's office.
1000649972.korean: - 궁금한 걸 물어보기 전에 히루메는 함장실 밖으로 나갔다.

1000649973.english: - I turned on the panel to check the schedule. I usually make a simple note when arranging appointments with the crew, but today's schedule is empty…?
1000649973.korean: - 패널을 켜서 스케줄을 확인했다. 대원들과 약속을 잡으면 간단하게라도 메모해두지만, 오늘 일정은 비어있는데...?

1000649974.english: - After struggling to recall for a while, I finally went to find Hirume.
1000649974.korean: - 한동안 떠올리려 애를 쓰다 결국 히루메를 찾아왔다.

1000649975.english: - If I've forgotten, it would disappoint her, but that's better than standing her up…
1000649975.korean: - 내가 잊어버린 거면 실망시키겠지만, 바람 맞히는 것보다야 낫겠지...

1000649976.english: - I pressed the call button and waited for a while, but there was no response.
1000649976.korean: - 호출 버튼을 누르고 한동안 기다려도 아무런 반응이 없다.

1000649978.english: What are you doing here? Ah, right! Hachiko of Castling just baked a new meat pie, would you like one?
1000649978.korean: 여기서 뭐하고 계세요? 아 참! 하치코가 새로 미트 파이를 구웠는데, 하나 드실래요?

1000649980.english: Master, you're not leaving yet? Hirume-nee went out earlier.
1000649980.korean: 주인님, 아직 안 가셨어요? 히루메 언니는 아까 나갔어요.

1000649982.english: No, Hachiko of Castling doesn't know anything.

1000649983.english: As I stared blankly, Hachiko of Castling avoided my gaze and eventually closed her eyes.
1000649983.korean: - 물끄러미 바라보니, 하치코는 내 시선을 피하다 결국엔 눈을 감아 버렸다.

1000649985.english: I held out one of the "Wish Coupons" Hachiko of Castling had given me.
1000649985.korean: - 하치코에게 선물 받은 '소원 쿠폰' 중 한 장을 내밀었다.

1000649986.english: Waaah! Even though it was Hachiko of Castling who said it…! But…!

1000649989.english: Hirume-nee didn't keep it a secret from you either…
1000649989.korean: 히루메 언니도 주인님한테 비밀이라고는 안 했으니까...

1000649992.english: Huh? Hachiko of Castling, you haven't gained weight!

1000649993.english: That's not what I meant, so don't worry.
