1000649994.english: These days, every time I see him, my pulse becomes unnaturally fast… Even though we've shared affection, my feelings for him continue to grow…
1000649994.korean: 요즘 그이를 볼 때마다 첩의 맥박이 기이할 만치 요란해지니... 정을 나눴음에도 연심이 계속해서 커져간다는 건...

1000649996.english: Um… can I eat the remaining meatball vegetable stir-fry, Hachiko of Castling?
1000649996.korean: 우음... 남은 미트볼 야채볶음 하치코가 먹어도 돼요?

1000649997.english: The concubine and he had been bound by a bond dating back to a past life...!
1000649997.korean: 첩과 그이는 전생에서부터 연을 맺어왔던 것이다...!

1000649999.english: Hehe, I'll allow it. That much is—

1000650000.english: No, not all of it! Take only half.
1000650000.korean: 저, 전부는 안 되느니라! 반만 가져가거라.

1000650002.english: Yum… But if we're talking about past lives, does that mean Hirume-nee and Master met long ago?
1000650002.korean: 냠... 그런데 전생이라면, 히루메 언니랑 주인님이 옛날에 만난 거예요?

1000650003.english: Right. Otherwise, there’s no way to explain the concubine’s feelings for him.
1000650003.korean: 그래. 그렇지 않으면 그이를 향한 첩의 연심을 설명할 수 없다.

1000650004.english: And perhaps… he may have already regained his memories from that past life.
1000650004.korean: 그리고 아마... 그이는 전생에서의 기억을 이미 되찾았을지도 모른다.

1000650006.english: I don't know if he realized it, but it was already ingrained in him.
1000650006.korean: 그이가 자각했는진 모르겠지만 이미 몸에 배어 있었지.

1000650007.english: Wasn't this morning's menu fried eggs?
1000650007.korean: 오늘 아침 메뉴가 계란 프라이였지 않았느냐?

1000650008.english: Yes, delicious fried eggs! Hachiko of Castling also helped make them in the kitchen.
1000650008.korean: 네, 맛있는 계란 프라이! 하치코도 주방에서 만드는 걸 도왔어요.

1000650009.english: I always eat my fried eggs dipped in soy sauce.
1000650009.korean: 첩은 계란 프라이를 항상 간장에 찍어 먹는다.

1000650010.english: Even though I’d never mentioned it... he smiled gently and handed me the soy sauce.
1000650010.korean: 단 한 번도 말한 적 없는데... 그이는 부드럽게 웃으며 간장을 건네주더구나.

1000650011.english: Yes… it was like the smile of a salsari flower blooming on the spring hill where we first met in a past life.
1000650011.korean: 그래... 마치 전생에 우리가 처음 만났던, 봄의 언덕에 피어있던 살사리꽃 같은 미소였다.

1000650012.english: Um… haven't I seen you dip it in soy sauce on another day?
1000650012.korean: 우음... 다른 날 간장에 찍어 먹는 걸 본 거 아니에요?

1000650015.english: These days, even when stroking me…

1000650016.english: Even when we were intimate, he always knew exactly what I wanted.
1000650016.korean: 저, 정을 나눌 때도 첩이 바라는 것을 전부 알아채 주었다.

1000650017.english: Ah! That's right! Master, whenever Hachiko of Castling thinks "I want to be petted…" he pets me, and whenever I think "I want a treat," he gives me one!
1000650017.korean: 아! 맞아요! 주인님은 하치코가 쓰다듬어줬으면... 하고 생각하면 쓰다듬어주고, 간식 먹고 싶다고 생각하면 간식 줘요!

1000650019.english: There is no doubt. He and I surely promised in a past life to spend eternity together, and after countless ages, we have reunited in this present life.
1000650019.korean: 의, 의심할 여지가 없다. 첩과 그이는 분명 전생에서 미래영겁 함께할 것을 약조했으며, 억겁의 시간이 지난 현세에 이르러 해후하게 된 것.

1000650020.english: If that's the case, surely… there must be a date and place agreed upon for when we think of each other.
1000650020.korean: 그랬다면 필시... 서로를 떠올렸을 때 만나기로 한 날짜와 장소가 있겠지.

1000650021.english: Now is not the time to linger. I must cast the divination quickly.
1000650021.korean: 이러고 있을 때가 아니구나. 어서 점을 쳐봐야겠다.

1000650022.english: Hachiko of Castling, can you watch too?

1000650023.english: Hehe, if it's Hachiko of Castling, I'll allow it anytime.

1000650024.english: Ah, but the story about past lives is a secret from others.
1000650024.korean: 아, 그래도 전생에 관한 이야기는 다른 이들에게는 비밀이다.

1000650025.english: It's a very precious… promise between him and me.

1000650026.english: From past lives… hehe, it tickles somehow!

1000650028.english: Now, finish eating the rest of the meatballs.

1000650030.english: Since that day, Hirume-nee has been preparing various things for today. The meatballs were delicious too!
1000650030.korean: 그날부터 히루메 언니는 오늘을 위해서 이것저것 준비했어요. 미트볼도 맛있었구요!

1000650031.english: - Even though I knew Hirume had a vivid imagination, I never expected it to extend to past lives… and with the added detail of a promise, it's no wonder I couldn't have thought of it.
1000650031.korean: - 히루메의 상상력이 풍부한 건 알고 있었어도 전생에까지 이를 줄은... 게다가 약속이라는 부가 설정까지 붙었으니, 내가 떠올리지 못하는 것도 당연하지.

1000650032.english: Earlier, she went outside after changing clothes.
1000650032.korean: 아까 옷을 갈아입은 뒤 바깥으로 나갔어요.

1000650033.english: Hmm… it's probably been another three hours.

1000650034.english: Master, you're going there too, right? Hirume-nee will be waiting.
1000650034.korean: 주인님도 거기 가시는 거죠? 히루메 언니, 기다리고 있을 거예요.

1000650035.english: - In any case, I've come to know Hirume's true feelings.
1000650035.korean: - 계기야 어쨌든 히루메의 진심을 알게 됐으니까.

1000650036.english: - I suppose her proficiency as an aide was the result of long hours of preparation.
1000650036.korean: - 부관 업무가 능숙했던 것도 오랜 시간 동안 준비했던 거겠지.

1000650037.english: Eh, did you forget the promised place? Then Hachiko of Castling will tell you where it is!
1000650037.korean: 에에, 약속 장소 까먹으신 거예요? 그럼 하치코가 어딘지 알려 드릴게요!

1000650038.english: Hachiko was watching from the side while I was drawing!
1000650038.korean: 점칠 때 하치코가 옆에서 보고 있었거든요!

1000650039.english: The place Hachiko of Castling told me was the summit of a nearby mountain. There's an aerial garden at the very top, and Hirume said she would be waiting there.
1000650039.korean: - 하치코가 알려준 장소는 멀지 않은 곳의 산 정상이었다. 맨 꼭대기에 공중정원이 있고 히루메는 거기서 기다리는 중이라고 했다.

1000650040.english: - Climbing the trail, the slope was the steepest I had encountered on any mountain so far. Hirume at the summit must have come up this way too.
1000650040.korean: - 등산로를 오르는데 여태 오른 산 중 가장 경사가 심했다. 정상에 있는 히루메도 이곳을 거쳐 갔겠지.

1000650041.english: - Fortunately, the moon was up, so I didn't get lost finding the way.
1000650041.korean: - 다행히 달이 떠있어서 길을 찾는데 헤매진 않았다.

1000650042.english: - I just needed to follow the trail. I quickened my pace.
1000650042.korean: - 등산로만 따라 올라가면 되겠지. 나는 걸음을 서둘렀다.

1000650044.english: - The aerial garden, landscaped mostly with short trees and flowers, was open and spacious compared to the trail.
1000650044.korean: - 키가 작은 나무와 꽃들 위주로 조경된 공중정원은 등산로와 달리 훤했다.

1000650045.english: - I was about to greet Hirume, who was standing on The cloud bridge in The center.
1000650045.korean: - 중앙의 구름다리 위에 서 있는 히루메에게 인사하려는데.

1000650046.english: - Seeing her give me a faint, silent smile, I lowered my hand, which I had raised halfway, and stepped closer.
1000650046.korean: - 말없이 살풋 미소만 보내오는 걸 보고, 반쯤 들어 올린 손을 다시 내린 뒤 가까이 다가갔다.

1000650047.english: It was a time not longer than eternity.

1000650049.english: Have you recalled all the memories of your past life?

1000650050.english: - If I say I didn't know, it would hurt her; if I say I did, she'll ask for details…
1000650050.korean: - 몰랐다고 하면 상처받을 거고, 안다고 하면 자세히 물어보겠지...

1000650051.english: - Seeing me hesitate to answer in a situation where either choice would be difficult, Hirume closed her eyes tightly.
1000650051.korean: - 어느 쪽을 골라도 곤란한 상황에서 대답을 주저하는 나를 보던 히루메는 지그시 눈을 감았다.

1000650052.english: ... Have you still not thought of it?

1000650053.english: It's okay, that's not what matters.

1000650054.english: The bond you and I will create in this life is more precious. Don't worry about it.
1000650054.korean: 그대와 첩이 현세에서 만들어갈 인연이 더 소중하다. 신경 쓰지 말거라.

1000650056.english: Even if you don't remember, I do.
1000650056.korean: 설령 그대가 기억하지 못한다 해도, 첩이 기억하고 있다.

1000650057.english: Hee hee, the moonlight falling on the garden creates such a serene atmosphere.
1000650057.korean: 후후, 정원에 달빛이 내려 참으로 고즈넉한 분위기구나.

1000650058.english: I'm going for a short walk, would you like to join me?

1000650059.english: Permission, huh... That's a bit much.

1000650060.english: When we first met, didn't you stroke my ears and tail without my permission?
1000650060.korean: 처음 만났을 때, 그대는 첩의 허락도 받지 않고 귀와 꼬리를 쓰다듬지 않았느냐?

1000650061.english: I'm joking. And now, if I'm being honest... Because I didn't hate the concubine either.
1000650061.korean: 농담이다. 그리고 이제 와서 솔직하게 이야기하면... 첩도 그리 싫지는 않았으니까.

1000650062.english: - Standing side by side like that, we soon strolled across the suspension bridge.
1000650062.korean: - 그렇게 나란히 선 우리는 곧 구름다리 위를 거닐었다.

1000650063.english: Even in the endless cycle of reincarnation, we've been married each time, spending countless days together without ever being apart for a moment, but...
1000650063.korean: 무량대수의 윤회 속에서도 매번 그대와 부부의 연을 맺고, 한시도 떨어지지 않은 채 오랜 나날을 보내왔지만...

1000650064.english: Every moment with you is always magical.
1000650064.korean: 그대와 함께 하는 매 순간은 언제나 신비롭구나.

1000650065.english: - Hirume smiled faintly and continued speaking.

1000650066.english: The concubine had previously believed that there was a limit to the size of the heart.
1000650066.korean: 첩은 이전까지 마음의 크기엔 한계가 정해져있다고 믿었다.

1000650067.english: I thought there were categories even for joy, anger, sorrow, and happiness, and that you couldn't feel beyond those.
1000650067.korean: 희로애락에도 범주가 있어 그 이상으로는 느낄 수 없다고 생각했지.

1000650068.english: However, with each new life I experience, my love for you, your servant, only grows without limit...
1000650068.korean: 허나 매번 새로운 삶을 경험할 때마다 그대를 향한 첩의 연심은 한계를 알 수 없이 커져만 가고 있으니...

1000650069.english: Emotions were not fiNight, but Infinite.
1000650069.korean: 감정이란 유한한 것이 아니라 무한한 것이었다.

1000650070.english: Heh heh, I wonder how much my love for you will grow in this lifetime...
1000650070.korean: 후후, 이번 생에서의 첩의 연심은 얼마나 커질런지...

1000650072.english: - I nodded to Hirume, who was cautiously looking at me.
1000650072.korean: - 조심스럽게 나를 바라보는 히루메에게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000650074.english: - Hirume smiled faintly and looked up at the Night sky.
1000650074.korean: - 작게 미소 지은 히루메는 밤하늘을 올려다보았다.

1000650077.english: The night sky this one gazed up at in Alaska was nothing but desolate.
1000650077.korean: 첩이 알래스카에서 올려다보던 밤하늘은 쓸쓸할 뿐이었거늘.

1000650078.english: While searching for food to survive day by day... Those were days when I was just surviving without a purpose in life.
1000650078.korean: 하루하루 연명하기 위해 음식을 찾아다니면서... 삶의 목적 없이 살아남는 게 전부인 나날이었는데.

1000650079.english: Just having you by my side...

1000650080.english: I think the moon and stars, and the surrounding scenery, are truly beautiful.
1000650080.korean: 달과 별이, 주변 경치가 참 아름답다는 생각이 드는구나.

1000650082.english: Having realized it now, it seems this one is every bit as greedy as you.
1000650082.korean: 이제 와서 깨달은 것이지만, 첩도 그대 못지않게 욕심쟁이인 것 같구나.

1000650083.english: Right here, right now, one more time... Promise your concubine.
1000650083.korean: 지금 이 자리에서 다시 한번... 첩에게 약조해 주거라.

1000650084.english: In this life, and in the next... Let's be together forever in the next life too.
1000650084.korean: 이번 생에서도, 다음 생에서도... 그다음 생에서도 영원히 함께하자고.

1000650085.english: And so... Will you do it?

1000650086.english: - When I held her trembling hand, Hirume seemed relieved and leaned into me.
1000650086.korean: - 가늘게 떨리는 손을 잡아주자, 히루메는 안심했다는 듯 안겨들었다.

1000650088.english: I'm so glad I met you in this lifetime - Achoo!
1000650088.korean: 이번 생에서도 그대를 만나 정말 다행- 에취!

1000650089.english: - Unlike the serious tone you had just a moment ago, your cute sneeze made me smile involuntarily.
1000650089.korean: - 조금 전까지의 진지한 말투와는 달리 귀여운 재채기 소리에 나도 모르게 웃음이 나왔다.

1000650091.english: - As I gently scratched his ears and asked, Hirume, who had been nuzzling his cheek against my chest, seemed to remember something and pulled away.
1000650091.korean: - 귀를 살살 긁어주며 물어보자, 내 품에 볼을 비비던 히루메가 무언가 떠오른 듯 몸을 뗐다.

1000650093.english: The concubine has written a song for our reunion with the help of Muse Yang, so listen.
1000650093.korean: 첩이 뮤즈 양의 도움을 받아 우리의 재회를 위한 노래를 지었으니, 들어보거라.

1000650094.english: - The urge to crack a joke at Hirume, who had scurried to the corner and was already operating the sound equipment she had set up,
1000650094.korean: - 구석으로 쪼르르 달려가 어느새 세팅해둔 음향기기를 조작하는 히루메에게 농담을 던지려는 마음은,

1000650095.english: - Hmm, hmm, after clearing my throat and seeing Hirume standing in the moonlight, I disappeared immediately.
1000650095.korean: - 흠흠 헛기침을 하고 달빛 아래에 선 히루메의 모습을 보자마자 사라졌다.

1000650097.english: - Using the moon and stars hanging in the Night sky and the fireflies around her as illumination, Hirume, with her eyes gently closed, creates a clear melody.
1000650097.korean: - 밤하늘에 걸린 달과 별, 주변의 반딧불을 조명 삼아, 살며시 눈을 감은 히루메가 청아한 선율을 자아낸다.

1000650098.english: - ... I heard it not long ago. The most important thing in a song is sincerity.
1000650098.korean: - ...얼마 전에 들었었지. 노래에 가장 중요한 건 진심이라고.

1000650099.english: - A deeply felt emotion conveyed through lyrics set to a classical melody.
1000650099.korean: - 고풍스러운 곡조 위에 실린 가사에 절절히 느껴지는 마음.

1000650100.english: - From Hirume singing under the moonlight, I can feel the genuine joy of meeting me.
1000650100.korean: - 달빛 아래에서 노래하는 히루메에게선, 나와 만난 것에 기뻐하는 진심이 느껴진다.

1000650101.english: - As I slowly opened my eyes and saw Hirume singing with a gentle smile, the thought suddenly occurred to me.
1000650101.korean: - 천천히 눈을 뜨고, 살며시 웃으며 노래하는 히루메를 보며 문득 그런 생각을 떠올렸다.

1000650102.english: - Perhaps... I'm starting to think that my connection with Hirume might really have started in a past life.
1000650102.korean: - 어쩌면... 히루메와 나의 인연은, 정말로 전생에서부터 이어진 걸지도 모르겠다고.

1000650103.english: During the reconnaissance mission, were there any unusual findings?

1000650104.english: No. It was ordinary, nothing special. We only had a little bit of iron and not much supplies.
1000650104.korean: 아뇨. 별다를 것 없이 평범했어요. 철충도 조금, 물자도 조금 밖에 없었고요.

1000650105.english: I'll share the detailed reconnaissance information on the tablet, so please check it.
1000650105.korean: 자세한 정찰 내용은 태블릿에 공유해둘 테니, 확인하세요.

1000650106.english: Okay, I understand. I'll report to the commander. Since there are no assigned tasks today, you can rest.
1000650106.korean: 알겠습니다. 사령관에게는 제가 보고할게요. 오늘은 배정된 임무가 없으니 쉬면 됩니다.

1000650107.english: Okay. But what about the commander?

1000650108.english: I'm catching up on some overdue work. Since I'm so busy, I, as the adjutant, came to receive the reconnaissance report.
1000650108.korean: 밀린 업무를 처리하고 있죠. 워낙 바쁘다 보니 정찰 보고는 부관인 제가 받으러 온 겁니다.

1000650109.english: Is that so... There's nothing we can do. I'll be heading back now.
1000650109.korean: 그런가요... 어쩔 수 없죠. 이만 돌아갈게요.

1000650111.english: ... Why are you staring so intently?

1000650112.english: ... Let me ask you something for a moment.

1000650113.english: As long as it's not something strange, I'm happy to...

1000650114.english: I'm sure they have complexes like me... Isn't it?
1000650114.korean: 분명 저처럼 콤플렉스가 있는 걸로 아는데... 아닌가요?

1000650115.english: Well, that's true, but why are you asking all of a sudden?
1000650115.korean: 무, 뭐 그렇기는 하지만, 갑자기 왜죠?

1000650116.english: Unlike me, what's the reason you can act so confidently?
1000650116.korean: 저와는 달리 그렇게나 당당하게 행동할 수 있는 이유가 뭡니까?

1000650117.english: I was wondering what all the noise was about, but it's my little brother needing advice? Well, I guess I have no choice. Especially this older sister-
1000650117.korean: 무슨 소리를 하나 싶었는데, 동생의 고민 상담이라니~ 어쩔 수 없군요. 특별히 이 언니가-

1000650118.english: Tsk. That's enough. Let's forget about the corrosion-related talk I mentioned earlier.
1000650118.korean: 쯧. 됐습니다. 이전에 말한 부식 관련 얘기는 없던 일로 하죠.

1000650119.english: Ah! Okay, wait a minute! That's not what you promised!

1000650120.english: Then stop talking nonsense and get straight to the point.
1000650120.korean: 그럼 이상한 소리 하지 말고, 본론부터 말씀하세요.

1000650122.english: As B-11 Night Angel said, I also have complexes. Sometimes it makes me feel depressed or angry.
1000650122.korean: 나이트 앤젤의 말대로 저도 콤플렉스가 있죠. 그것 때문에 가끔은 우울해지기도, 화가 나기도 하고요.

1000650123.english: But you'll experience many things in life, and you can't keep worrying about just that one thing, can you?
1000650123.korean: 하지만 살다 보면 많은 일들이 있을 텐데, 계속 그것만 신경 쓸 수는 없잖아요?

1000650124.english: Of course, even if I say I don't care, it doesn't mean it doesn't bother me when someone points out my insecurities.
1000650124.korean: 물론 신경 쓰지 않겠다고 해서, 콤플렉스를 지적당하는 게 아무렇지 않은 것은 아니에요.

1000650125.english: But you can't be pessimistic forever. You have to overcome it.
1000650125.korean: 그렇지만 언제까지 비관적으로 있을 수는 없어요. 극복해 내야 하는 겁니다.

1000650126.english: How were you able to overcome it?

1000650127.english: Because I've found my strengths, I can shift people's focus from my weaknesses to my strengths.
1000650127.korean: 제 강점을 찾아냈으니까, 약점에서 강점으로 사람들의 시선을 옮길 수 있으니까요.

1000650128.english: Wouldn't it be better to highlight your strengths more, as that can also hide your weaknesses?
1000650128.korean: 자신의 강점을 더 돋보이게 하는 게 약점을 감출 수도 있어서 더 좋지 않을까요?

1000650129.english: ... Focusing only on your weaknesses will only torment yourself.
1000650129.korean: ...본인의 약점만 신경 쓰는 것은 자신을 괴롭힐 뿐이에요.

1000650132.english: Did you all enjoy your lunch? Let's start the broadcast!
1000650132.korean: 여러분 점심 식사는 맛있게 하셨나요? 방송을 시작할게요!

1000650133.english: Orangeade's Radio, Orca Live! Thank you so much to all the listeners who are listening to OraOra today!
1000650133.korean: "오렌지에이드의 라디오, 오르카 라이브!" 오늘도 오라오라를 듣고 계신 청취자 여러분들 정말 고맙습니다!
